To break free, they must crack every puzzle and outsmart Dr Jiang at her own game. Will they escape or get slimed?

programme.title: Team Curious S3 - EP 55
programme.desc: Quincy is a boy full of curiosity and a sense of justice. He also has a mysterious identity - the captain of Q-team. Quincy and his partners all have magical badges, which allow them to turn into special agents, and gives them incredible powers and skills to guard their town.

programme.title: Tuesday Report : Unusual Confession S2 - EP 5
programme.desc: Ivan Peh’s truck traverses Singapore’s streets daily, collecting discarded items that he carefully sorts and restores before donating to local communities in need. Each year, a portion of refurbished goods is shipped to Sri Lanka, where two local monks receive and distribute them to beneficiaries. Through his efforts, objects once considered worthless are given a renewed second life.

Soon, the group splits into two teams-one braves a leech-filled mountain trail, while the other wades through a waist-deep stream. With thrills and laughter at every turn, this Malaysian adventure keeps pushing them to their limits!

programme.title: Unforgivable - EP 9
programme.desc: 55's daughter Shanshan starts to take nude photo and watch pornography under the influence of her online boyfriend. Police psychologist Jackie steps in to help find out whether she is being catfished. At the same time, Shu Ya suspects those actors in the pornography could be underage and decides to investigate. Junhao collapses and is hospitalized, Guan Lin takes care of him, bringing them closer.

programme.title: Unforgivable - EP 10
programme.desc: SOD discovers that the pornography is being released by a channel called SG Satay. To attract more subscribers, the suspect starts to install pinhole cameras in the women's restroom. While investigating the case, Jun hao's grandmother passes away. The team tries to be his source of support and comfort. Although Yifan has feelings for Guan Lin, he cannot help but notice her affection for Junhao.

programme.title: New Stirrings - EP 3

programme.title: Frontline - EP 44
programme.desc: More seniors in their sixties and seventies are choosing to pursue their passions and make meaningful contributions at work even after retirement. What drives them to keep going instead of resting on their laurels?

programme.title: Aroma Syawal
programme.desc: In 'AROMA SYAWAL,' a daughter's love and her father's fading memory rekindle through the aroma of cherished recipes, unveiling family secrets and the enduring Hari Raya spirit.

programme.title: Banjir Raya - EP 1
programme.desc: Ghazali moved back to his hometown with his wife and step child because he was transferred to a nearby school. His return is not welcomed by his mother. In addition, Ghazali still carries a grudge against his neighbour, Wak Tarjo because of an incident.

programme.title: Banjir Raya - EP 2
programme.desc: Helmi does not want to stay with his parents at their new home. The relationship between Nek Munah and her step grandchild, Badriah is better. However, Nek Munah still does not accept the existence of her daughter-in-law, Leha in her life.

programme.title: Banjir Raya - EP 3
programme.desc: Due to Wak Tarjo's accident, the villagers work together to clean the big drain. Omar also starts his own business to compete with his father. Meanwhile, Helmi causes another accident in the village.

programme.title: Banjir Raya - EP 4
programme.desc: The villagers work hard to get ready for Raya even though the water levels are rising. Harianto insists on bringing Helmi back to his flat after another problem arises. On the night of Raya, Ghazali did not return home.

programme.title: Banjir Raya - EP 5
programme.desc: The heavy rain has fallen and many places have been flooded. The villagers are forced to flee to a safer place. However, they worry if their homes will be safe while trying to find their missing family members.

programme.title: Marhaban Ya Ramadan - EP 1
programme.desc: Two weeks before Ramadan starts, Ratna and Farah attend a relatives wedding and bump into an old ex-university mate, Stanley, who is now a Muslim convert. Around the same time, both are asked to lead teams to help fund raise at Ustaz Umars' Insan for a Ramadan project. This year also marks the first Ramadan since the death of the cousins grandmother. Farah's mother, Maria, reminds her siblings to continue with their late mum's family traditions.

programme.title: Marhaban Ya Ramadan - EP 2
programme.desc: Abdullah (Stanley) invites Ratna and Farah to join a weekend online religious class. Maria notices Mardiana is distracted and reminds her to not to be too preoccupied with trivial stuff and instead stay focussed on Ramadan. Maria resolves to stay away from social media for one month. At Insan, Ratna decides to 'take charge' and her behaviour is not welcomed by Farah.

programme.title: Upin & Ipin S9 - EP 6
programme.desc: In the 9th season of Upin and Ipin, the boys are excited to play with Tok Dalang's little chicks. They learn about different kinds of books as their homework and overcoming the dengue fever spread over Kampung Durian Runtuh.

programme.title: JMJ Magika Raya
programme.desc: JMJ Magika Raya follows Ayla on a magical journey exploring heritage and the spirit of Hari Raya. One day, Ayla quarrels with her mum and falls asleep while clutching a folklore book. In a dreamlike world, she meets legendary Malay icons such as Hang Nadim, Radin Mas and Badang. Through these encounters, Ayla learns that the true spirit of Raya lies in forgiveness, gratitude, love and togetherness.

programme.title: Sinar Lebaran 2026

A tribute to heritage, love and belonging-reminding us that wherever life takes us,HOME is where the ketupat is!

programme.title: Ambisi Licik Penjual Ikan Asin
programme.desc: Anwar (Adhitya Alkatiri) is a salted fish trader in a fishermen’s market who is greedy, harsh, and money-hungry. One day, he shamelessly mixes formalin into his salted fish to gain bigger profits. Later, his wife Endah (Soraya Rasyid) tries to advise him, but Anwar responds with violence.

programme.title: LIGA DANGDUT 2021 - EP 44
programme.desc: 70 Ambassadors from 34 Provinces compete for the Champion of the Largest Dangdut Competition in Indonesia. Best display, spectacular stage.

programme.title: Bukan Preman Bener Tapi Beneran Preman

They got into a verbal war. Finally, after Qia's friends arrived, the thugs left. Meanwhile, Aldo, who had a girlfriend, was suddenly dumped by his girlfriend because she didn't want him to be a thug.

programme.title: Jalan Cinta Cindy
programme.desc: Cindy (Rayna Snova) janjian dengan kekasihnya yang bernama Rama di sebuah restoran. Cindy berpikir di tempat romantis tersebut Rama akan melamarnya. Namun, harapan Cindy sirna saat mengetahui bahwa Rama mengajaknya bertemu karena Rama ingin memutuskan hubungan cintanya dengan Cindy. Mengetahui hal tersebut, hati Cindy sangat hancur. Ia pun termenung di tempat tersebut sambil memikirkan nasib hidupnya yang penuh kesedihan. Lalu, Cindy merasa ada seseorang yang sedang memotret dirinya.

Agung yang penuh kerja keras, bertemu Maya (Larasati Nugroho), seorang aktris yang membantu dan menjadi tempat ceritanya.

programme.title: Aura Duar Jadian yang Tertukar
programme.desc: Fadi the campus thug and Naura the prima donna of the campus often fight, the last time they fussed about assignments. Accidentally when they pushed the push there was a statue that fell. The statue gives off light. But that day nothing happened and they were indifferent. Arriving in the morning, Fadi and Naura woke up with switched souls. Fadi & Naura are confused about why they are in different bodies.

programme.title: Buku Harian Monalisa
programme.desc: Menceritakan tentang kehidupan seorang gadis bernama Monalisa (Azella Alhamid). Monalisa tinggal di rumahnya yang besar dan mewah bersama asisten rumah tangganya. Meski demikian, Monalisa sering menjadi korban bully di kampusnya. Pada suatu hari, Monalisa dikurung di dalam kamar mandi oleh teman-teman kuliahnya. Beruntung Aldo (Julian Jacob), temannya membantunya.Aldo mendobrak pintu kamar mandi hingga Monalisa akhirnya bisa keluar. Setelah itu, Monalisa langsung memeluk Aldo dengan erat.

programme.title: Aku Bergetar Disentuh Putri Mirip Iklan di TV
programme.desc: Topan is a student archaeologist, who is known to believe in mystical things. Because of his unusual tendencies, Topan was shunned by his friends. Especially after Topan confessed that he met a princess. Topan said that the Princess was a figure from the past or a very beautiful kingdom. What is the next part of the story?

programme.title: Konser Hepi Sampai Pagi
programme.desc: "Konser Hepi Sampai Pagi" is a dangdut music show broadcast by Indosiar, featuring top dangdut stars with exciting stage performances and signature coastal dance moves. The concert presents hit songs from the 1970s to the 2010s performed by legendary dangdut singers and alumni of Indosiar talent shows.

programme.title: NUMPANG CURCOL JADI CINTA
programme.desc: Nanang met Dhea and they got into an argument. Nanang liked Dhea at first sight. But Ghea felt repulsed by him. Nanang was from Brebes and was naive and innocent, while Dhea was a trendy city girl. Ghea found a boarding house for Nanang, and they ended up living in the same neighborhood. As time goes on... Nanang always listens to Dhea's complaints about her life and her crush. Does Dhea realize that Nanang has feelings for her?

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 137
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Miss Biduan I Love You Sekebon
programme.desc: Adrian (Elryan Carlen) is upset with Tifa (Ina Marika) for refusing to evict her house. Because of this, Tifa has to lose her job. Fortunately, Tifa meets a grandmother who offers her a job after helping her.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 591
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 85
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: MISS KUDA PEMACU CINTA
programme.desc: Asih always knew how to handle the horses at Burhan's ranch, Sandra's father. Bimo came to Burhan's ranch to undergo a series of tests, one of which was riding and caring for horses. As soon as he got on the horse, Bimo fell off. Fortunately, Asih was there to help. Asih was annoyed with Bimo because his car horn nearly caused one of the horses to become agitated. Since Burhan noticed that Bimo and Asih knew each other, he asked Asih to train Bimo in horseback riding.

programme.desc: Bara (Masaji Wijayanto) is a famous soccer player, he does not want to continue his grandmother's business of managing an inn. Yuna is a goat-herding village girl who is quick-tempered. When they meet because when Bara kicks the ball that causes Yuna's goats to run away.

programme.title: MENJARING CINTA DI TAMBAK NILA
programme.desc: Since becoming poor, Nila (Yuniza Icha) lives with her grandfather and manages his fish farm. Reza (Naufal Samudra), a regular customer at Nila’s fish pond, is upset because she no longer wants to sell him her fish. However, Reza keeps trying to persuade her since they both need the money.

programme.desc: Diva (Ika Diharjo) accidentally saw Andre (Christ Laurent) being hypnotized on the street, Diva and her mother finally brought Andre to her house even though the cat is kucingan with Mr. RT. It has been going on for several hours that the hypnosis does not disappear and makes Andre realize who he really is. Diva and her mother are getting dizzy, so they agree to give Andre the pseudonym Cecep.

But all of that was disproved by Topan's earnestness when learning dangdut music.

programme.desc: Topan (Indra Brotolaras) goes to the village to look for his biological mother with a photo provided by his father. programme.title: Gaami
programme.desc: Shankar isolates himself to cure a rare condition, but his journey forces him to confront buried fears and emotional wounds that hold the true key to his survival.

programme.title: Aparichit - The Stranger
programme.desc: Timid Ambi who suffers from multiple personality disorder becomes Aparichit who does not think twice about killing wrong-doers.

programme.title: Kites
programme.desc: Wounded and hunted, a man crosses the desert to reunite with his beloved, evading police and killers while clinging to hope for a peaceful life together. Release Year: 2010 Director: Anurag Basu Awards: 5 nominations

programme.title: Khiladiyon Ka Khiladi
programme.desc: While searching for his missing brother, Akshay joins gangster Maya's gang, proving his strength and loyalty by fighting her ruthless rival in a high-stakes wrestling match to survive. Release Year: 1996 Director: Umesh Mehra

programme.title: Coolie No. 1 (1995)
programme.desc: A clever matchmaker fools Hoshiyar Chand into thinking Raju is rich, sparking hilarious chaos as Raju pretends to be wealthy to win love and teach a lesson. Release Year: 1995 Director: David Dhawan Awards: 3 nominations

programme.title: Dabangg
programme.desc: A corrupt police officer is trapped between his family, criminals, and politicians, forcing him to face the consequences of his choices and the price of power. Release Year: 2010 Director: Abhinav Kashyap Awards: Best Screenplay: Abhinav Kashyap, Dilip Shukla, Best Action: Fefsi Vijayan, Best Choreography: Farah Khan, Best Sound Re-Recording: Leslie Fernandes Awards of the International Indian Film Academy

programme.title: Karan Arjun
programme.desc: Reborn in different lands, Karan and Arjun reunite through their mother's faith, rising again to take revenge on those who destroyed them in a past life. Release Year: 1995 Director: Rakesh Roshan Awards: Best Action- Bikhu Verma, Best Editing- Sanjay Varma.

programme.title: Zee Cine Awards 2026
programme.desc: A night celebrating blockbuster films, iconic performances, and music as Bollywood's biggest stars unite for glamour, emotions, surprises, and unforgettable moments. Watch now.

programme.title: Attack - Part 1
programme.desc: A terrorist attack renders Arjun paralysed and distraught with the thoughts of his dead lover. So, when the attacker returns, Arjun participates in an experiment to seek revenge.

programme.title: Taal
programme.desc: Humiliated by her ex's family, Mansi rebuilds her life with Vikrant's help, but when her former lover returns seeking forgiveness, old pain threatens her new success. Release Year: 1999 Director: Subhash Ghai

programme.title: Karan Arjun
programme.desc: Reborn in different lands, Karan and Arjun reunite through their mother's faith, rising again to take revenge on those who destroyed them in a past life. Release Year: 1995 Director: Rakesh Roshan Awards: Best Action- Bikhu Verma, Best Editing- Sanjay Varma.

programme.title: Super Singh
programme.desc: A simple man gains mysterious superpowers and begins a life changing journey where love, courage, sacrifice, and self belief teach him his true purpose in the world.

programme.title: Chori Chori Chupke Chupke
programme.desc: Raj and Priya hire Madhubala as a surrogate, but when she falls for Raj and wants the baby, emotions explode, testing trust, love, and the future of their marriage. Release Year: 2001 Director: Abbas Alibhai Burmawalla Awards: Bollywood Movie Award - Most Sensational Actor - Salman Khan

programme.title: Karz
programme.desc: Monty discovers his past life murder by his greedy wife and, with his lover's support, sets out to reclaim his family honour, wealth, and lost legacy. Release Year: 1980 Director: Subhash Ghai Awards: Filmfare Awards- Best Music Director- Laxmikant Shantaram Kudalkar , Pyarelal Ramprasad Sharma .

programme.title: Wanted
programme.desc: Radhe, a merciless contract killer, falls for simple Jhanvi, who challenges his dark world and forces him to choose between love, redemption, and his violent life. Release Year: 2009 Director: Prabhu Deva

programme.title: Koyla
programme.desc: Mute and loyal Shankar tricks Gauri into marriage for his master, but love grows unexpectedly, and she bravely stands by him against every cruel obstacle. Release Year: 1997 Director: Rakesh Roshan

programme.title: Khiladiyon Ka Khiladi
programme.desc: While searching for his missing brother, Akshay joins gangster Maya's gang, proving his strength and loyalty by fighting her ruthless rival in a high-stakes wrestling match to survive. Release Year: 1996 Director: Umesh Mehra

programme.title: Saiyaara

programme.desc: The life of Sardar Udham Singh, a revolutionary freedom fighter best known for assassinating Michael O'Dwyer in London to take revenge for 1919 Jallianwala Bagh massacre in Amritsar

programme.title: Metabeats

programme.title: Goin' Bulilit

programme.title: Lavender Fields
programme.desc: The life of a simple flower farm girl is shattered when she falls for a charming accountant, who turns out to be a married gun cartel member. Targeted for his stolen money, she loses everything she holds dear and reinvents herself to seek justice.

programme.title: The Alibi
programme.desc: Vincent is accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real.

programme.title: What Lies Beneath
programme.desc: The lives of four individuals are turned upside down after they witness the murder of their friend. They band together to put the alleged killer behind bars, but years later, the imprisoned man seeks revenge, unraveling dark secrets that test their loyalty and survival.

programme.title: The Secrets of Hotel 88
programme.desc: The Secrets of Hotel 88 dives into a gripping story of the estranged Fernandez brothers - Martin, Gio and Kiko - who unexpectedly inherit Hotel 88 following their father's death. Driven by conflicting motives, the three find themselves locked in escalating tension and a brewing family feud.

programme.title: Ngayon at Kailanman
programme.desc: Eva fights to reclaim her place in the wealthy Cortes family while searching for the truth about her identity. Fate brings her together with Inno, and their love story endures family secrets, rivalry and tragedy as they discover the real meaning of forgiveness and redemption.

programme.title: Pamilya Sagrado
programme.desc: Being a prominent political clan, the Sagrados want nothing but to keep their name faultless and sacred, until a controversial incident comes their way.

programme.title: Olivia
programme.desc: 1890. Near Fontainebleau. Olivia starts her new school year at a wealthy girls' boarding school run by two teachers, Miss Cara and Miss Julie, who are much admired by the pupils. The ingenue Olivia soon falls under the spell of the erudite and charismatic Julie. An all-female film, elegant and sultry.

programme.title: Lola Sang Contact
programme.desc: While women live under the absolute authority of their husbands, Lola and her friends have obtained permission to spend an evening in a restaurant. During this interlude, they talk about their nightmarish daily lives.

programme.title: Qu'importe La Distance
programme.desc: At five in the morning, Yalla walks out on her job as a care assistant without telling her boss. Exhausted, she boards a bus. And so begins a long journey by public transport towards someone who is waiting for her.

programme.title: Elles - EP 6
programme.desc: Many disparities exist in the fast-growing city of Austin. Sarahmee distributes food parcels to the most needy in the company of the Afro-American women of Black Women in Business. She discovers motorcycling with the Femoto group, who demand a place on America's roads, and learns about cricket.

programme.title: Elles - EP 7
programme.desc: In Dakar, Sarahmee discovers the harm caused by depigmentation thanks to women who combat this phenomenon as part of Aiida. She meets female rappers defending women's rights and learns about traditional oyster fishing alongside members of Mboga Yaay group.

programme.title: Terra Artistika - EP 9
programme.desc: Landscapes, reflections, the velvety depth of the night... The artist Malgorzata Paszko talks about her themes, her technique, her research.

programme.title: 64' Actu
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. programme.desc: Every Friday, journalists from the French-language media and TV5MONDE's partner channels share their views on current affairs.

programme.desc: All the African news from the TV5MONDE news staff.

programme.title: Yetili - EP 5
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees to read them a story.

programme.title: Yetili - EP 6
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees to read them a story.

programme.title: Bestioles En Questions - EP 28
programme.desc: As a nature enthusiast, emilie is very interested in the behaviour of insects and other small creatures. What do ants eat? Why are frogs slimy? Can a tortoise catch a cold? No question goes unasked!

programme.title: Les Metiers - EP 33
programme.desc: To gain a better understanding of some professions, school children explain jobs to their parents in their own words.

programme.title: Ta Vie Sans Ca - EP 19
programme.desc: What would life be like without our most everyday objects? Each episode puts a different one in the spotlight. Whether a tap, an umbrella or a toothbrush, they all have a story to tell about their invention and subsequent evolution.

programme.title: La Clef - C'est Quoi Ton Truc Julie ? - EP 4
programme.desc: Julie Provencher is a mother passionate about education. With her, it's impossible to get bored! In each episode, she gives tips and tricks to parents so they can educate their children while having fun.

programme.title: Partie De Campagne - EP 23
programme.desc: Surrounded by fields, near a vast forest and a pretty stream, lies the village of Bellefontaine. It's home to the fun-loving gang of friends Raphael, Lina, P'tit Pied and Grande Perche. Bubbling over with imagination, they fill every day with exciting adventures.

programme.title: Partie De Campagne - EP 24
programme.desc: Surrounded by fields, near a vast forest and a pretty stream, lies the village of Bellefontaine. It's home to the fun-loving gang of friends Raphael, Lina, P'tit Pied and Grande Perche. Bubbling over with imagination, they fill every day with exciting adventures.

programme.title: Les Triples - EP 26
programme.desc: The triplets may look like angels, but they're not the last to get up to mischief... The two brothers and the sister are inseparable and as loving as they are mischievous. The adults need to be brave to channel their energy!

programme.title: Potobot - EP 7
programme.desc: Twelve year-old Chloe is feeling somewhat disillusioned. Then Potobot, a little robot arrives from the future with a mission for her: to change the world and make the future a better place. There's no doubt about it, working together, one step after another, the two of them can move mountains!

programme.title: L'aventure Du Monde Des Mondes - EP 17
programme.desc: Dimitri, Raph's and Anais's uncle, is a French globetrotter who is fascinated by nature. He gives them tasks to stimulate their creativity. Thanks to Blox, a small robot, they access the ''world of the worlds'', a secret fantasy place where they can play and learn.

programme.title: Roi Keita - EP 3
programme.desc: The entire empire is on alert: Soundiata Keita's mother has been kidnapped. Abdul, as thirsty for power as ever, heads to the city of the sacred baobab trees.

programme.title: Ma Vie Avec L'ia - EP 8
programme.desc: Theo, a teenager, questions artificial intelligence directly to try to understand it better. He wants to know what it is made of, what feeds it, and how it analyzes data.

programme.title: Falo
programme.desc: A news magazine show, ''Falo'' discusses and analyses current affairs in depth.

programme.title: Objectif Monde L'hebdo - EP 23
programme.desc: Using cloning, genetics and cross-breeding, researchers are trying to revive mammoths, wolves and other extinct species. A spectacular scientific quest that combines ecological hope and ethical controversy.

programme.title: Ding Dong : Montre-Moi Ta Maison ! - EP 12
programme.desc: We start the show with a steampunk enthusiast. Then we change scenery and atmosphere and visit a house in the Kloten cemetery.

programme.title: Le Magazine De La Riviera
programme.desc: The magazine programme all about the art of living in Monaco, Provence and on the Cote d'Azur.

programme.title: Suisse En Scene
programme.desc: Interview with a key figure from the Swiss cultural scene. An opportunity to look back at their life and career, and the foundations that underpin their work.

programme.title: Rassemblance - EP 14
programme.desc: Former professional wrestler, Rakesh Jain arrives in France with a special sports visa. Seduced by Paris and French culture, he quickly learns the language and becomes a yoga trainer in prestigious centers. An opportunity to illustrate the inspiring fusion of French and Indian cultures.

programme.title: Le Match Dans Le Match - EP 79
programme.desc: We welcome a recently retired cyclist: the Dane Jakob Fuglsang looks back on his career, which he ended a few weeks ago.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: Generation F
programme.desc: Fashion, gastronomy, sports, urban cultures, lifestyle... The artist Richard Orlinski explores the ''French touch''. Between Dakar, London and Montreal, he meets the new generation of French-speaking creators and highlights an uninhibited, creative, bold Francophonie.

programme.title: Hep Taxi !
programme.desc: In town or in the countryside, day or night, Jerome Colin, the presenter-taxi driver leads his prestigious customer on a four-wheel journey conducive to secrets.

programme.title: Refuges De Montagne - Hiver - EP 3
programme.desc: The restrictions imposed by Covid-19 are also complicating life at the refuges. For Ursula and Ruedi, last minute cancellations are problematic. At the Brunni, it's decision time to sell off excess provisions and limit staff costs. Nicole and Turi Naue have to complete the work at the Trift.

programme.title: Terra Artistika - EP 10
programme.desc: ''Painting is first and foremost a place of work.'' A painter of abstraction, Anne Slacik has spent twenty-five years developing her work, always closely connected to contemporary poetry. Encounter...

programme.title: Tendance XXI - EP 22
programme.desc: An in-depth look at Chopard and Goossens, jewellers, and their exceptional expertise. Above all, jewellery is a dream, often made in gold. The exquisite Chanel exhibition. The history of the watch and of Richard, gold and silversmith. Parisian jewellery of tomorrow, available today from Persta, Sister Morphine and Karl Mazlo.

programme.title: Version Francaise - EP 24
programme.desc: In Wingen-sur-Moder, the Musee Lalique presents the abundant work of Rene Lalique and his successors. Olivier Polge is the perfumer for Chanel. For Vuitton, Pharrell Williams breaks down the boundaries between music, fashion and art. Aurore Mazeres carries on the skills of five generations of upholsterers who preceded her.

programme.title: Questions Pour Un Champion
programme.desc: A general knowledge quiz.

programme.title: Savourer - EP 12
programme.desc: On the menu: crab croquettes, shepherd's pie croquettes, fridge-clear-out polenta croquettes, Asian-style salmon croquettes.

programme.title: Parlons Eco - EP 6
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's new economic news bulletin, presented by Vicky Bogaert. ''Parlons eco'' analyses today's major trends and interviews the men and women who are starting businesses, innovating and imagining the economy of tomorrow.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Gims A Paris La Defense Arena : Le Concert Evenement
programme.desc: A rain of hits and an extraordinary stage design! The artist, who has sold eight million albums, streamed more than ever and showered with awards, raises his voice before an enthralled audience. From "Bella" to "Ciel", here is Gims, at the centre of the immense arena, delivering a spectacular and unifying performance.

programme.title: Meurtres A Amiens
programme.desc: On a canal amidst the ''hortillonnages'', the floating market gardens of Amiens, a lifeless body is found in a Nautilus-shaped fun-fair gondola. Inspector Monet and his assistant Barnier head the investigation. The victim, a seemingly ordinary woman, was apparently threatened ambitious plans for a Jules Verne theme park.

programme.title: Terra Artistika - EP 10
programme.desc: ''Painting is first and foremost a place of work.'' A painter of abstraction, Anne Slacik has spent twenty-five years developing her work, always closely connected to contemporary poetry. Encounter...

programme.title: Banel Et Adama
programme.desc: In a remote village in northern Senegal. Banel and Adama love each other deeply, passionately, carried by their dreams. But can the absolute love that binds them truly withstand the weight of traditions? A bold and poetic contemporary tragedy.

programme.title: Mboa, Matanda, Le Tournoi Des Rois
programme.desc: Within the city of Mboa Matanda, the Crab and Cayman districts have been doing battle for centuries. Tasked with restoring peace, General Dibombe organises a wrestling tournament between the champions of the different districts. But then he finds himself facing General Essoka, the man who had murdered his family.

programme.desc: Malik, Daouda's eldest son, wants to marry Mariama. But when a meeting between the two families, both originally from Senegal, is organised over a meal, Daouda discovers that they are from two very different social classes. His family is ''griot''; Mariama's is noble.

programme.title: Yetili - EP 7
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees to read them a story.

programme.title: Yetili - EP 8
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees to read them a story.

programme.title: Bestioles En Questions - EP 29
programme.desc: As a nature enthusiast, emilie is very interested in the behaviour of insects and other small creatures. What do ants eat? Why are frogs slimy? Can a tortoise catch a cold? No question goes unasked!

programme.title: Les Metiers - EP 34
programme.desc: To gain a better understanding of some professions, school children explain jobs to their parents in their own words.

programme.title: Ta Vie Sans Ca - EP 20
programme.desc: What would life be like without our most everyday objects? Each episode puts a different one in the spotlight. Whether a tap, an umbrella or a toothbrush, they all have a story to tell about their invention and subsequent evolution.

programme.title: La Clef - C'est Quoi Ton Truc Julie ? - EP 5
programme.desc: Julie Provencher is a mother passionate about education. With her, it's impossible to get bored! In each episode, she gives tips and tricks to parents so they can educate their children while having fun.

programme.title: Partie De Campagne - EP 25
programme.desc: Surrounded by fields, near a vast forest and a pretty stream, lies the village of Bellefontaine. It's home to the fun-loving gang of friends Raphael, Lina, P'tit Pied and Grande Perche. Bubbling over with imagination, they fill every day with exciting adventures.

programme.title: Partie De Campagne - EP 26
programme.desc: Surrounded by fields, near a vast forest and a pretty stream, lies the village of Bellefontaine. It's home to the fun-loving gang of friends Raphael, Lina, P'tit Pied and Grande Perche. Bubbling over with imagination, they fill every day with exciting adventures.

programme.title: Les Triples - EP 27
programme.desc: The triplets may look like angels, but they're not the last to get up to mischief... The two brothers and the sister are inseparable and as loving as they are mischievous. The adults need to be brave to channel their energy!

programme.title: Potobot - EP 8
programme.desc: Twelve year-old Chloe is feeling somewhat disillusioned. Then Potobot, a little robot arrives from the future with a mission for her: to change the world and make the future a better place. There's no doubt about it, working together, one step after another, the two of them can move mountains!

programme.title: L'aventure Du Monde Des Mondes - EP 18
programme.desc: Dimitri, Raph's and Anais's uncle, is a French globetrotter who is fascinated by nature. He gives them tasks to stimulate their creativity. Thanks to Blox, a small robot, they access the ''world of the worlds'', a secret fantasy place where they can play and learn.

programme.title: Roi Keita - EP 4
programme.desc: The entire empire is on alert: Soundiata Keita's mother has been kidnapped. Abdul, as thirsty for power as ever, heads to the city of the sacred baobab trees.

programme.title: Football - Ligue 1 Mcdonald's
programme.desc: A match from the French football championship.

programme.title: Football - Ligue 1 Mcdonald's
programme.desc: A match from the French football championship.

programme.title: Destination Francophonie
programme.desc: A journey throughout the French-speaking world to explore every corner of the globe! In each country we meet francophones who present, in French, their culture, way of life and commitments. The programme also shines a spotlight on local projects that keep the French language alive, dynamic and constantly evolving.

programme.title: Basik
programme.desc: The programme which explores and explains the economy, examines our relationship to money and analyses our purchasing power. The economic, social and environmental challenges of tomorrow are covered in a direct, down-to-earth and occasionally mischievous manner!

programme.title: A Bon Entendeur
programme.desc: ''ABE'' examines a wide range of topics affecting everyday life in everyday homes: it tests products, compares prices, highlights fraudulent practices, raises consumer awareness and questions manufacturers. The programme addresses economic, social, environmental and health issues and talks about leisure activities, technology...

programme.title: Le Grand Jt Des Territoires
programme.desc: Up-to-date news from the French regions presented by Cyril Viguier.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: Vivement Dimanche
programme.desc: On his iconic red sofa, Michel Drucker welcomes and shines the spotlight on the talent of yesterday, today and tomorrow. A main guest talks about their career, their projects and their origins...

programme.title: Echappees Belles
programme.desc: Sophie Jovillard, Jerome Pitorin, Ismael Khelifa and Tiga embark the traveller that lies within each of us for a fabulous breath of fresh air! Ninety minutes filled with new horizons and fascinating encounters around the world, four different ways of seeing a city, a region, a country...

programme.title: Rassemblance - EP 14
programme.desc: Former professional wrestler, Rakesh Jain arrives in France with a special sports visa. Seduced by Paris and French culture, he quickly learns the language and becomes a yoga trainer in prestigious centers. An opportunity to illustrate the inspiring fusion of French and Indian cultures.

programme.title: Questions Pour Un Champion
programme.desc: A general knowledge quiz.

programme.title: La Grande Galerie Francophone - EP 22
programme.desc: Every week and in public, Ali Baddou and his group of columnists receive French-speaking artists who are at the heart of current events and move the lines. Space for exchanges, creations and surprises, ''La Grande Galerie Francophone'' celebrates art in all its diversity and shares it with everyone.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Un Dimanche A La Campagne
programme.desc: A weekend together, far from the hustle and bustle of everyday life. A moment out of time to get to know one another, talk of love, friendship, life. In a house open to surprises and the unexpected, between emotion and laughter, each reveals the invisible thread of their personal story...

programme.title: Top 14 Rugby Le Mag - EP 19
programme.desc: Presenting the day's action in the Top 14, the French rugby championship, with summaries and highlights from the matches, players interviews and comments.

programme.title: Carbone - EP 10
programme.desc: Pierre Chastenay, Yanick Villedieu and Christian Messier are three scientists who share the same springtime passion: producing artisanal maple syrup.

programme.title: #Investigation
programme.desc: Your rendezvous for current affairs and investigative journalism from the RTBF teams. Research, evidence, personal stories and confrontations are at the heart of the film reports about a range of subjects mainly relating to Belgian society. The key words? Independence and transparency!

programme.title: FANZONE - FRI 20 MAR (Live)
programme.desc: This is the show that puts international fans at the heart of the Premier League conversation. We connect with fans from around the world as they share their views on their teams and favourite players.

programme.title: PREVIEW - FRI 20 MAR
programme.desc: We look ahead to the Tyne-Wear derby between Newcastle and Sunderland, a relegation battle as Spurs host Nottingham Forest, and Liverpool's trip to Brighton.

programme.title: WELCOME TO THE WEEKEND - FRI 20 MAR
programme.desc: Liverpool manager Arne Slot has a great surprise for a diehard fan at the club's training ground while Ayo's in the seaside city of Brighton as last season's champions prepare to pay a visit. Aston Villa winger Emi Buendia tells us how he could have gone professional in another sport.

programme.title: FANTASY SHOW - FRI 20 MAR
programme.desc: Haaland or Salah? Saka or Palmer? Isak or Cunha? Picking your Fantasy team is never easy, but the Fantasy Show is on hand to help FPL Managers with those big decisions.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 32
programme.desc: Sunderland have been one of the stories of the Premier League season so far, and at the heart of the Black Cats' remarkable return to the English top flight is Granit Xhaka. This week, The Big Interview sits down with the Swiss international to reflect on an impressive season at the Stadium of Light and life in the North East.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 37
programme.desc: Andoni Iraola went from relative obscurity to leading a once relegation-threatened club to its highest ever points tally in the Premier League. We explore how his fearless philosophy, tactical innovation and emotional connection to the game have driven his teams to challenge expectations and rewrite their identity. A story of a Basque footballing icon, and his remarkable journey from Cyprus to the Premier League with Bournemouth in 5 years.

programme.title: PREMIER LEAGUE LIVE (Live)
programme.desc: Matchweek 31 begins with Friday night football as Man Utd make the trip to the south-coast to take on Bournemouth.

programme.title: Bournemouth v Manchester United (MW31) (Live)
programme.desc: Live match action from the latest match round of the Premier League, with insight, analysis, and reaction from our expert panel of studio guests.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 42
programme.desc: Ahead of the Tyne-Wear Derby, we catch up with former Newcastle striker Demba Ba at USL Dunkerque, where he is 'Head of Football Operations'. He opens up about the challenges and rewards of his new role, while reflecting on a remarkable career in the Premier League that took him to West Ham United, Newcastle United and Chelsea. From unforgettable moments on the pitch to shaping his approach off it, Ba shares insights into the experiences that continue to influence his vision for the game today.

programme.title: THE SATURDAY WRAP - SAT 21 MAR

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 32
programme.desc: Sunderland have been one of the stories of the Premier League season so far, and at the heart of the Black Cats' remarkable return to the English top flight is Granit Xhaka. This week, The Big Interview sits down with the Swiss international to reflect on an impressive season at the Stadium of Light and life in the North East.

programme.title: PL RIVALRIES - EP 1
programme.desc: Rivalries don't get much bigger than Sunderland v Newcastle. With the Wear-Tyne derby around the corner, Sunderland legend Kevin Phillips and former Newcastle goalkeeper Shay Given sit down to discuss why this game matters so much and to talk through their top ten moments from the derby over the years.

programme.title: PREMIER LEAGUE LIVE (Live)
programme.desc: The super Sunday begins with the Tyne-Wear Derby as Newcastle host rivals Sunderland at St. James' Park. Then struggling Spurs take on Nott'm Forest in a huge relegation clash at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium.

programme.title: Newcastle United v Sunderland (MW31) (Live)
programme.desc: Live match action from the latest match round of the Premier League, with insight, analysis, and reaction from our expert panel of studio guests.

programme.title: Tottenham Hotspur v Nottingham Forest (MW31) (Live)
programme.desc: Live match action from the latest match round of the Premier League, with insight, analysis, and reaction from our expert panel of studio guests.

programme.title: The Art Of... 2025/26 - EP 2
programme.desc: Legendary goalkeeper, Petr Cech, sits down with Will Perry to discuss the role of the goalkeeper in the Premier League and how it has changed over the years. Cech gives his unique insight into the mentality of a goalkeeper and reflects on his career before breaking down and analysing some of the key attributes that make a great goalkeeper. He also selects five iconic Premier League goalkeepers to build his dream keeper for the modern game.

programme.title: PL Rewind 2025/26 - EP 16
programme.desc: Jimmy Floyd Hasselbaink was one of the most prolific strikers English football has ever seen. The two time Golden Boot winner looks back on his time at Leeds United and Chelsea, revisiting his greatest goals and most memorable matches.

programme.title: PL Stories 2025/26 - EP 42
programme.desc: Ahead of the Tyne-Wear Derby, we catch up with former Newcastle striker Demba Ba at USL Dunkerque, where he is ‘Head of Football Operations’. He opens up about the challenges and rewards of his new role, while reflecting on a remarkable career in the Premier League that took him to West Ham United, Newcastle United and Chelsea. From unforgettable moments on the pitch to shaping his approach off it, Ba shares insights into the experiences that continue to influence his vision for the game today.

programme.title: Brentford vs Wolverhampton Wanderers (MW30) - EP 300
programme.desc: Wolves have won their last two Premier League games, having only won one of their previous 32 (D8 L23).

programme.title: Bournemouth vs Manchester United (MW31) (Live) - EP 302
programme.desc: Bournemouth are unbeaten in their last five Premier League games against Manchester United (W2 D3), scoring more goals in these five (13) than they did in their first 12 against the Red Devils in the division (10).

programme.desc: Relive the best action from the Premier League with this fast-paced ISO angle highlights show, featuring every game and every goal from each matchround.

programme.desc: Burnley have won just one of their last 21 Premier League games (D7 L13), though four of their 10 points in this run have come away against London sides (3-2 vs Crystal Palace, 1-1 vs Chelsea).

programme.title: Leeds United vs Brentford (MW31) - EP 306
programme.desc: Leeds are winless in their last five Premier League games (D3 L2), failing to score in each of their last three. They last had a longer run without a goal in February/March 2022 (4 games).

programme.title: Newcastle United vs Sunderland (MW31) (Live) - EP 307
programme.desc: Sunderland are unbeaten in their last 10 league games against Newcastle (W7 D3), winning seven of the last eight. It’s the joint-longest run either side has had without defeat in the history of the fixture (Newcastle also 10 between 1985 and 1997).

programme.title: Aston Villa vs West Ham United (MW31) (Live) - EP 308
programme.desc: West Ham are winless in their last six Premier League games against Aston Villa, alternating between a draw (3) and defeat (3) each time.

programme.title: Tottenham Hotspur vs Nottingham Forest (MW31) (Live) - EP 309
programme.desc: Tottenham Hotspur remain winless in 12 Premier League games (D5 L7); in their top-flight history, only from April to November 1912 (13) and from December 1934 to April 1935 (16) have they ever gone longer without winning.

programme.title: Aston Villa vs West Ham United (MW31) (Live) - EP 308
programme.desc: West Ham are winless in their last six Premier League games against Aston Villa, alternating between a draw (3) and defeat (3) each time.

programme.title: FS MMA Mario Rinaldi vs. Mark Burch
programme.desc: BodogFIGHT features classic MMA matches involving some of your favorite fighters! Mario Rinaldi looks to extend his winning streak against Mark Burch in this rematch which takes place in beautiful Costa Rica.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Sergio Martinez vs. Paul Williams I
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features middleweights Sergio 'Maravilla' Martinez (44-1, 24 KOs) vs. Paul 'The Punisher' Williams (37-1, 27 KOs) from Boardwalk Hall in Atlantic City, New Jersey, USA, on December 5, 2009. The result was a controversial majority decision, and the two would eventually square off in a rematch about a year later.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Juan Manuel Marquez vs. Michael Katsidis
programme.desc: This episode features lightweight champion Juan Manuel Marquez defending against Michael Katsidis, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: Judo for the World
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this episode we see the best of the Hohhot Grand Prix, and stop to get to know the world's #1 ranked fighter Aleksandar Kukolj. We then head to Russia to witness the effect that Judo has on the Russian people.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Keith Thurman vs Orlando Lora
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is the undefeated Keith Thurman facing off with Orlando Lora. A left hook and right uppercut combination ends this fight. Also on the card, action from former heavyweight champion James Kirkland.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 5 featuring Mitakeumi, Goeido, Okinoumi and Takakeisho from the Aki basho, 2019.

programme.title: Karate 1 Premier League
programme.desc: Dublin, Ireland welcomes one of the most anticipated events in Martial Arts this year as the Karate 1 Premier League returns. This will be the first Karate 1 Premier League event to take place in Dublin, with many of the top competitors in the world making the journey to Ireland for the first time and where the new Grand Winners will be crowned.

programme.title: BWF Martial Arts
programme.desc: This episode features highlights from the Men's Weapons as well as Girl's Forms and Team Demo highlights.

programme.title: FS MMA Mario Rinaldi vs. Mark Burch
programme.desc: BodogFIGHT features classic MMA matches involving some of your favorite fighters! Mario Rinaldi looks to extend his winning streak against Mark Burch in this rematch which takes place in beautiful Costa Rica.

programme.desc: This episode features highlights from the Men's Weapons as well as Girl's Forms and Team Demo highlights.

programme.title: FS MMA Mario Rinaldi vs. Mark Burch
programme.desc: BodogFIGHT features classic MMA matches involving some of your favorite fighters! Mario Rinaldi looks to extend his winning streak against Mark Burch in this rematch which takes place in beautiful Costa Rica.

programme.title: WCCB Tim Tszyu vs. Sebastian Fundora
programme.desc: From the T-Mobile Arena in Las Vegas, undefeated Super Welterweight World Champion Tim Tszyu travels from Australia to defend his title against former World Champion Sebastian Fundora. Fundora stands 6'5", and is known for his all-action and exciting style. He replaces an injured Keith Thurman, and jumps into a World Title match-up against one of boxing's rising stars in Tszyu.

programme.title: Fight Quest
programme.desc: Episode 5: Marseille, France - Hosts Jimmy Smith and Doug Anderson learn the Fight Discipline of Savate and the Martial Art of Hands and Feet with Masters Christian Robert, Frank May, Frederic Baret, Laurent Bois and Patrick Gellat.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Shane Mosley vs. Sergio Mora
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is "Sugar" Shane Mosley facing off with Sergio Mora with a highly disputed and controversial decision you will have to see to believe! The two never had a rematch. Also on the card, action from WBC Super Welterweight champ Jermell Charlo.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 1 featuring Kakuryu, Ichinojo, Daieisho and Koteoko from the Nagoya basho.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Canelo Alvarez vs. Carlos Baldomir
programme.desc: This episode features then-WBC silver light middleweight champion Saul (Canelo) Alvarez looking to give Carlos Baldomir his first career KO loss, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: MMA:30
programme.desc: This episode features ring girl Arianny Celeste making a high schooler's dreams come true when she goes as his date to his prom. Also, we catch up with Clay Guida and Urijah Faber at the LA Fit Expo and we go behind the scenes for an intimate photo shoot with beautiful ring girl Amber Nicole.

programme.desc: Check out exciting action from MMA organizations around the world. programme.title: WCCB Rolando Romero vs. Anthony Yigit
programme.desc: Rolly takes on Anthony Yigit of Sweden at the AT&T Center in San Antonio on the undercard of the Jermell Charlo/Brian Castano contest. Rolly comes into this bout with an undefeated 13-0 record, while Yigit is 24-1-1, having won three straight bouts after his first career loss to Ivan Baranchyk. Watch Rolly Romero vs. Anthony Yigit, only on FIGHT SPORTS.

programme.title: Greatest Classics Hector Camacho vs. Tony Menefee
programme.desc: Hector "Macho" Camacho, always entertaining and flamboyant, stepping into the ring with 62-4 Tony Menefee in Lincoln, Nebraska. Camacho was on the comeback trail, following an up and down year that saw him defeat the legendary Sugar Ray Leonard by TKO before dropping a unanimous decision to Oscar De La Hoya for the WBC Welterweight Title. With his eyes on another title shot he faces Menefee, in the midst of a 14-fight win streak.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Canelo Alvarez vs. Kermit Cintron
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is Canelo Alvarez taking on Kermit Cintron in a bout that helped elevate Alvarez into the light middleweight title picture and take another step towards becoming one of the biggest names in boxing. Also on the card, action from a classic battle between Joel Casamayor and Michael Katsidis for the WBO Lightweight title.

programme.title: Teletubbies (S1) - EP 65
programme.desc: The Teletubbies hear a 'honk honk' in the distance and the Tubby Car approaches. The Tubby Car drives the Teletubbies across Teletubbyland as they sing the Tubby Car song.

programme.title: Yakka Dee (S2) - EP 19
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'flower' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure! We see a pink flower, a yellow flower, a frilly flower and silly squirty flowers too!

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO (S3) - EP 15
programme.desc: Everyone in OKIDO is feeling very tired. Messy tries to help by adding extra superbeans to Farmer Fuddle's new recipe, but now everyone has far too much energy! How can Messy help them burn it off?

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops (S1) - EP 5
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo only wanted to help fix a satellite dish with Mojo's chopper top. Now they've been mistaken for a UFO, and the whole town is in a tizzy about invading aliens!

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 23
programme.desc: When Dad's accused of fluffing in Bluey's face as he climbed out of bed, he's put on trial with Mum as the judge, and Bluey and Bingo as witnesses. Bluey might also have to explain what she was doing there.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 22
programme.desc: Bluey promises her customer, Bingo, the best tour ever in a game of Whale Watching, but they need Mum and Dad to join in, and they are too tired to play after a late night.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 10
programme.desc: Roly needs a wee, but the door is locked and Duggee has mislaid the key. Not to worry, Duggee has his metal detector.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 9
programme.desc: The Squirrels find a dusty, old book behind a cupboard... it's Duggee's diary from when he was a teenager! The Squirrels are keen to write diaries of their own.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 8
programme.desc: Spring has sprung! There are cute baby animals to meet and frolic with.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 9
programme.desc: Spot the odd one out or guess who lives here. A great memory tip from Duggee, an edition of The Agony and Eggstacy, and how to draw Enid - down to her last whisker.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S3) - EP 1
programme.desc: Glitch is not happy when he has to work with Kyan in a Hollywood film.

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 21
programme.desc: Bluey, Bingo, Mum and Dad play a game of hand puppets, exploring the land beyond the Blue Mountains where they outsmart the Cheeky Fox to find the softest ever beds.

programme.title: Bluey (S2) - EP 24
programme.desc: While Mum and Dad struggle to build new flat-pack furniture, Bluey and Bingo transform the empty boxes into their own new world.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 35
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want Dad all to themselves and will not let Mum have a smoochy kiss. They try to hide him all around the house, but Mum is desperate to spend a little romance time with her husband.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 36
programme.desc: Judo desperately wants to play in the dirt with Bluey and Bingo, but she is not supposed to get herself dirty.

programme.title: Andy's Aquatic Adventures (S1) - EP 9
programme.desc: Andy heads to Costa Rica to find out how frogspawn survives in the wild.

programme.title: Playtime Towers (S1) - EP 5
programme.desc: Bella and Lift visit the Cloud Kitchen, where Patch is busy with the Playtimers making a tasty treat called Munchy Muddy Meadows.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S4) - EP 37
programme.desc: The Squirrels are causing a bit too much mess in the clubhouse, so Duggee explains that they need to think more carefully about what they are doing.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S4) - EP 36
programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels set off on a warm-up run together. The Squirrels are feeling sleepy, but they are told that a bit of exercise will wake them up!

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S4) - EP 35
programme.desc: The Squirrels are having fun playing a song they made, but they wish that they could see themselves perform. Duggee has a great suggestion, and they learn how to be creative.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 7
programme.desc: GrimHQ crashes into the Baobab trees. Can the Go Jetters rescue a baby lemur in time?

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 6
programme.desc: A giant grimbot bounces down the valley of Machu Picchu. Can the Go Jetters stop him?

programme.title: Thomas & Friends (S24) - EP 15
programme.desc: Gordon and Rebecca do the same work, but go about it differently, and when Rebecca tries to be more like Gordon, it doesn't go well.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck (S3) - EP 34
programme.desc: When Umbrella gets left on the bus, Sarah and Duck head to the bus depot in search of their friend.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck (S3) - EP 36
programme.desc: Sarah & Duck do a spot of gardening.

programme.title: Stan Can (S1) - EP 9
programme.desc: Stanley must teach his friends how to knit. They all knit so much they burst out the top of the community centre. Stanley repairs the roof with the groups knitting.

programme.title: Stan Can (S1) - EP 8
programme.desc: Stanley must deliver some parcels on the train but ends up delivering the wrong ones. After correcting his mistake, he has to muster the townsfolk to help stop his runaway train.

programme.title: Number 1 Newton Avenue (S1) - EP 8
programme.desc: Libby has made a mini golf course out of cardboard in the shared garden. Libby tries to instruct her Mum on how to navigate the course but ends up confusing herself.

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran (S3) - EP 19
programme.desc: JoJo loves Gran Gran's jewellery, especially the brooch from Great-Gran Gran. She's also excited to make her own special treasures, just like Captain Chloe.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 18
programme.desc: When a heavy summer rain thunders over the Heeler home, Bluey is determined to dam the water in the front yard, while Mum tries to stop her constantly tracking mud into the house.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 19
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo make mud pizzas and deliver them to the grown-ups, but their pedal car's wheel keeps falling off.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 20
programme.desc: With only five minutes to play 'Driving', Bluey and Mum race against the clock to buy milk for a grumpy guest and have to escape an angry shopkeeper.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 24
programme.desc: Happy discovers his wobbly tooth has come out, but he's lost it! He's having a problem remembering where he was when it fell out.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 23
programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels help to put on an amateur dramatic show.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 2
programme.desc: Worm and Ladybird wonder what's going on at Squirrel Club. There's a gorilla playing drums, some helpful ducks, a hot frog, four goats and a hospital run by chicken doctors.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 37
programme.desc: The Go Jetters travel to Kinderdijk in The Netherlands to celebrate National Mill Day.

programme.title: Roots & Fruits (S1) - EP 13
programme.desc: Raspberry sings a song, saying it's cool to be kind.

programme.title: Roots & Fruits (S1) - EP 12
programme.desc: Live from the Roots & Fruits theatre, it's the magical Pineapple attempting to perform a very difficult magic trick with the help of Kiwi.

programme.title: Supertato (S1) - EP 22
programme.desc: A sporty Brussel Sprout, who's training Carrot to do the Ultimate Flip Kick, is Evil Pea in disguise. Evil Pea captures Supertato, but Carrot finally masters the flip kick and rescues him.

programme.title: Supertato (S1) - EP 23
programme.desc: Supertato is delighted when Evil Pea becomes his sidekick but it's all a trick and Evil Pea captures him! Evil Pea is forced to do a good deed because one of the Cobs needs help.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 17
programme.desc: The Squirrels want to get a World Record, but in what? And Duggee is too busy to help. "If only we had more Duggee's" muses Tag. Which gives Norrie a record-breaking idea...

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 18
programme.desc: What are the rules about being in charge? Make a plan, keep everyone happy, make decisions, lead by example and listen. Roly takes that one so seriously he gets a bit overwhelmed.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 19
programme.desc: From sensible chuckles and nervous giggles to Duggee's infectious laughter, once everyone starts, it's so hard to stop. What were they laughing about again? Anyone remember?

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 5
programme.desc: King Tiger and the Jelly wonder what Duggee has planned for today. Tag wants a snack, Enid has a musical cheese chase, and Norrie has a haircut.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 6
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, Duggee forgets how to woof, Duggly comes to visit, Roly celebrates Potato Time, and Billy teaches everyone the Bugatron dance!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 7
programme.desc: Betty recalls the first time she pushed the red button, the Squirrels explore a range of emotions with Happy, Angry Bull tells a not-so-sleepy bedtime story, and the gerbils sing.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 11
programme.desc: Dad agrees to play Sheepdog with Bluey and Bingo to stop them from disturbing Mum who is taking a well-earned rest, but looking after a sheep is harder work than they expected.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 12
programme.desc: Mum and Dad vow to only finish their boring housework when the kids stop acting silly, but that's never going to happen, so they end up trying the same approach themselves.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 13
programme.desc: Lucky's Dad is outraged that modern Pass the Parcel has a present in every layer and changes the rules back to only having one prize in the middle, but Bingo is forever losing.

programme.title: Teletubbies (S1) - EP 83
programme.desc: The Teletubbies enjoy a game of 'What's your name?' Later, there's a surprise when a bowl of Tubby Custard joins in with the game!

programme.title: Teletubbies Ready Steady Go! (S1) - EP 7
programme.desc: Join the dance party with the Teletubbies! Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po dance and sing on safari.

programme.title: Pop Paper City (S1) - EP 27
programme.desc: Phoebe and her friends are enjoying a Pop Paper City winter wonderland! But can Phoebe help to make a snowman before a snowstorm arrives?

programme.title: Dog Loves Books (S1) - EP 17
programme.desc: Dog and Pug go on an adventure where they shrink to the size of little insects. They meet Granny Pug who is searching for a very rare Butterfly.

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO (S1) - EP 12

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 4
programme.desc: Can the Go Jetters save the world's stinkiest plant from becoming Glitch's latest perfume?

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 5
programme.desc: Xuli finds a shipwreck on a coral reef and learns some glitches don't need to be fixed.

programme.title: My World Kitchen (S1) - EP 6
programme.desc: Naima is cooking a special Algerian Borek. Borek is made from pastry, mashed potato, meat, cheese and you can even add olives. She can't wait for her friends to taste it!

programme.title: Andy's Baby Animal Missions (S1) - EP 12
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head to Chihuahua, Northern Mexico to discover how a colony of black tailed prairie dogs protect their pups from prowling bull snakes, hawks and coyotes as the pups take their critical first steps above ground.

programme.title: Swashbuckle (S8) - EP 24
programme.desc: In this special compilation episode, Squawk takes us on a journey to find Captain Captain's top Swashbuckle moments. We will see her silliest songs, most marvellous moments and messiest slops.

programme.title: Panda and Krash (S1) - EP 11
programme.desc: Rori is building a castle with building blocks, which intrigues everyone.

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 51
programme.desc: When Mum goes out to a baby shower, Dad takes charge of the girls' evening routine. But with Bluey missing Mum, Dad has to pull out all the games he knows to keep them entertained.

programme.title: Bluey (S2) - EP 1
programme.desc: After Dad eats her last chip, Bingo is given three chances to put Mum and Dad in "Dance Mode" as payback. But the others can't resist taking Bingo's turns for her.

programme.title: Bluey (S2) - EP 2
programme.desc: On a trip to Hammerbarn, Bluey and Bingo create their own mini-homes side-by-side in the trolley. But Bluey quickly gets jealous of her neighbour, Bingo.

programme.title: Supertato (S1) - EP 52
programme.desc: Broccoli screens Supertato: The Movie, but Evil Pea has plans to change the story.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 18
programme.desc: What are the rules about being in charge? Make a plan, keep everyone happy, make decisions, lead by example and listen. Roly takes that one so seriously he gets a bit overwhelmed.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 19
programme.desc: From sensible chuckles and nervous giggles to Duggee's infectious laughter, once everyone starts, it's so hard to stop. What were they laughing about again? Anyone remember?

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 20
programme.desc: Loveable Duggee and the Squirrels return with more educational fun.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 6
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, Duggee forgets how to woof, Duggly comes to visit, Roly celebrates Potato Time, and Billy teaches everyone the Bugatron dance!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 7
programme.desc: Betty recalls the first time she pushed the red button, the Squirrels explore a range of emotions with Happy, Angry Bull tells a not-so-sleepy bedtime story, and the gerbils sing.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 8
programme.desc: Spring has sprung! There are cute baby animals to meet and frolic with.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 12
programme.desc: Mum and Dad vow to only finish their boring housework when the kids stop acting silly, but that's never going to happen, so they end up trying the same approach themselves.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 13
programme.desc: Lucky's Dad is outraged that modern Pass the Parcel has a present in every layer and changes the rules back to only having one prize in the middle, but Bingo is forever losing.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 14
programme.desc: For her Father's Day card, Bluey sets out to draw a picture of herself and her father together. While recalling her favourite memories of playing with Bandit, Bluey struggles with the idea that her drawing must be perfect. Chilli tries to convince Bluey that perfection isn't easy, or absolutely necessary.

programme.title: Teletubbies (S1) - EP 84
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po enjoy a game of musical statues. It takes the Teletubbies a few turns to work out what to do when the music stops; they must stand very still.

programme.title: Teletubbies Ready Steady Go! (S1) - EP 8
programme.desc: Join the dance party with the Teletubbies! Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po dance and sing about silly things that make them smile.

programme.title: Pop Paper City (S1) - EP 28
programme.desc: As everyone else gets their films ready for a big movie night, Zip still doesn't know what his film should be about. He wonders whether he will have a film to show at movie night after all.

programme.title: Dog Loves Books (S1) - EP 18
programme.desc: Dog and Pug have a power cut in the bookshop. They want to know what it was like before electricity and they go to an old lighthouse. The light is about to go out before the keeper can return.

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO (S1) - EP 13
programme.desc: Messy, a monster, explores science questions that children ask about the world around us. Messy finds a very dusty sock underneath his bed, but why does it make him teary? He goes to OKIDO to find out.

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO (S1) - EP 14
programme.desc: Messy, a monster, explores science questions that children ask about the world around us. Messy wants to know how his goldfish friend can stay underwater for so long. He goes to OKIDO to find out.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops (S1) - EP 7
programme.desc: Preston's automated scooter tour of Swoppiton doesn't go as planned. Mojo and Bo must find a way to chase down and scoop up those scooters, and get the tour back on track!

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran (S1) - EP 9
programme.desc: JoJo tries to grow a daffodil but is disheartened to learn that it will take a long time to bloom. Cynthia and Gran Gran show JoJo how to take care of it and the best way to measure its growth.

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran (S1) - EP 8
programme.desc: When JoJo can't find her favourite Captain Chloe storybook, Gran Gran suggests they make up their own story.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck (S3) - EP 22
programme.desc: After their snacks go missing, Sergeant Sarah & Constable Quack are on the trail of a biscuit burglar.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck (S3) - EP 23
programme.desc: Stumbling across an arcade, Sarah takes on a dancing challenge with John, whilst Duck and Flamingo team up to try and defeat a video game!

programme.title: Thomas & Friends (S24) - EP 20
programme.desc: Thomas is asked to help at the animal park for the day and realizes that it also involves being decorated as a monkey.

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 14
programme.desc: Forced to wait five minutes in front of a restaurant for their takeaway, Bluey and Bingo become restless for entertainment, pushing the very limits of Dad's patience.

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 15
programme.desc: Playing 'Butterflies' in the backyard is great fun, until Bluey runs away with Judo leaving Bingo all alone. Now poor Bingo's heartbroken and Bluey needs to make amends.

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 16
programme.desc: Bingo loves playing with Dad, but sometimes he forgets Bingo is smaller than her sister. Mum teaches Bingo how to use her big girl bark to keep the fun within her limits.

programme.desc: Evil Pea freezes the veggies so she can take over the whole supermarket. Chilli's heat unfreezes Supertato who then races on lolly-stick skis to thwart Evil Pea and save the day.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 39
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Aardvark didn't have a sticky tongue. He had a long nose, big clumsy paws and he found it very difficult to eat. Then one day Aardvark's tongue got stuck in the honey log! All his friends pulled and pulled until KERPLING! Aardvark's tongue finally came unstuck. From that day on Aardvark's tongue was all long and sticky - perfect for eating yummy termites. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 40

Suddenly an enormous wave picks up Whale and carries her all the way from the ocean to the Waterhole. SPLOSH! But Whale was so full of water that she couldn't move! How do the animals help Whale get back to the ocean? For once, Elephant has the answer. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Pawn Stars (S24) - EP 600
programme.desc: Rick races to nab a 1959 go-kart. Can he pave his way to a deal? A collection of toys from "Jurassic Park" comes roaring into the shop. But are these toys as dino-mite as Chum hopes?

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd (S3) - EP 3
programme.desc: Mother Nature may be breathtaking-but she doesn't always play nice. Whether it's a mile-long sinkhole that swallows everything in its path or a biblical swarm of crop-killing grasshoppers.

programme.title: Lost U-Boats Of WWII - EP 6
programme.desc: Racing an incoming hurricane, Darrell Miklos and his team are forced to make tough choices. But after a season-long search, they locate the source of the massive magnetometer hit recorded at Target 4.

programme.title: The Secret Of Skinwalker Ranch (S4) - EP 11
programme.desc: When the team performs a hi-tech experiment at the Triangle, it leads to a stunning revelation that may explain the strange phenomena on Skinwalker Ranch.

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries (S4) - EP 25
programme.desc: Thieves steal half a billion dollars in masterpieces from the Gardner Museum. An exhaustive search has failed to recover the stolen goods. Who orchestrated the biggest art heist in history and why?

programme.title: Ancient Aliens (S15) - EP 236
programme.desc: Ancient Aliens is counting down the top ten alien petroglyphs around the world, from strange, human-like figures to flying craft and carvings of what appear to be astronauts.

programme.title: Hazardous History With Henry Winkler (S1) - EP 8
programme.desc: You thought your job was tough? Uncover the dangerous gigs of the past - from mercury-poisoned hat makers to kids crawling through chimneys - and imagine the risks behind everyday jobs of old.

programme.title: Mountain Men (S13) - EP 4
programme.desc: Lauro hunts caribou in whiteout conditions on Alaska's North Slope; Bret and Ivy, buried under heavy snowfall, push to set their 230-mile trapline; Daniel launches from his floating cabin to hunt deer.

programme.title: Forged In Fire (S10) - EP 8
programme.desc: Tasked with making the gruelling Ginunting sword in just five hours, only one will be left standing to compete against either J. Neilson, David Baker or Ben Abbott.

programme.title: The Toys That Built The World (S3) - EP 9
programme.desc: From Lionel Trains to video games, for the right collector, our childhood toys can be worth millions! Over the last decades, people have paid some truly outrageous prices for the toys they always wanted.

programme.title: The Toys That Built The World (S3) - EP 10
programme.desc: For six decades two silly but savvy entrepreneurs-S.S. Adams and H. Fishlove-turned their love of a good joke into a booming prank toy industry. Their rivalry produced hundreds of tricks and gags.

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries (S5) - EP 8
programme.desc: Five years after John F. Kennedy is killed by gunshot, his brother Robert meets the same fate. Who is really behind the killing of Robert Kennedy, and why?

programme.desc: From a long-lost keepsake tied to the world's most famous astronaut to a giant flying reptile that once ruled the skies... Some extraordinary discoveries remind us to keep looking up.

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd (S3) - EP 4
programme.desc: Have you heard about the slackliner that takes a walk between two hot air balloons? Or the teenager whose hobby turns his block into a hazmat zone? These are the stories of history's most unusual pastimes.

programme.title: The Mega-Brands That Built The World (S3) - EP 22
programme.desc: American cars get a makeover when an engineer creates the first sports car. And Detroit's Big 3 begin transforming their functional, practical cars into American sports cars.

programme.title: The Pickers (S18) - EP 315
programme.desc: Mike and Robbie go wild for a killer main street pick in Tennessee while Danielle visits Cleveland's queen of burlesque to close the deal on a racy piece of history.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Dead West - EP 3
programme.desc: When beloved matriarch Sherry Black, 64, is murdered in her rare books store in Salt Lake City, investigators suspect theft as the motive.

programme.title: Undercover: Caught On Tape - EP 9
programme.desc: Undercover agent Jerry Speziale's career shifts after a bullet; Agent Ed Newcomer probes hawk killings in California.

programme.desc: When the supposed great-niece of Marilyn Monroe, Krystal Jean Baker, 13, is found dead beneath a bridge in Texas' Bayou Country, investigators are stumped.

programme.desc: This special brings viewers inside the courtroom as celebrities are forced to sit in the hot seat and provide on-camera testimony.

programme.title: CI Asia: Marked By A Rapist
programme.desc: A man rapes all the females inside an establishment at gunpoint. He remains at large until he leaves his fingerprints on a bubble tea cup at a shop, which helps the police investigate the case.

programme.title: Lie Detector: Truth Or Deception - EP 1
programme.desc: Years after Gary Coleman’s controversial and tragic death, his ex-wife agrees to take a polygraph test to confront lingering suspicions and silence the rumours that she was responsible for his death.

programme.title: Beyond The Headlines: The Series - EP 1

programme.desc: An undercover NYPD officer and an ATF special agent learn firsthand not to trust a suspect's demeanour, regardless of how amicable it may appear.
