programme.desc: Girish Sawlani brings you a weekly roundup of international news from an Australian perspective as reported by ABC News correspondents covering the Indo Pacific, Europe, North America, the Middle East, India and Indonesia.

programme.title: Common Cause S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: As Indonesia's elderly population grows faster than the global average, Romy Hidayat creates an innovative senior care program in his community, backed by Indonesia's expat community in Australia - and their culinary skills.

programme.title: Ellis Park
programme.desc: Warren Ellis, the brilliant Nick Cave and the Bad Seeds musician, reveals his life's ups and downs as well as his dedication to a wildlife sanctuary in the forests of Sumatra, in Justin Kurzel's documentary debut.

programme.title: AFL Premiership Season (2026) - EP 18
programme.desc: ABC Australia brings you Australian Rules football live in your lounge room every week with coverage of the 2026 AFL Premiership Season.

programme.title: Common Cause S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: As rising sea temperatures devastate coral reefs, a community in Papua New Guinea teams up with an Australian organisation - and the feisty village chicken - to restore fish stocks in their coastal waters.

programme.title: The Chef's Garden S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: Chef Massimo Mele pairs delicious Tongola goat curd with freshly-picked beetroot and vegetables. Then it's into the pure Tassie waters where Massimo samples some of the world's best oysters.

programme.title: On Country Kitchen S2 - EP 4
programme.desc: It's season 2 and Derek still can't cook! With locally found ingredients, and a sprinkle of culture and character, Mark and Derek create an Indigenous-inspired feast for the people they visit along their journey.

programme.title: ABC National News (2026) - EP 81
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time for transparency and trust. ABC News brings you today's top stories and latest news, with more reporters to tell you what's going on and why it matters. Presented by Meredith Sheehan.

programme.title: Play On S2 - EP 2
programme.desc: Episode two sees two of the world's toughest games: footy in the Tiwi Islands and Kabaddi. A highlight for host Paul Kennedy is witnessing the monumental return to Bathurst Islands of favourite son Willie Rioli Jnr.

programme.title: Ellis Park
programme.desc: Warren Ellis, the brilliant Nick Cave and the Bad Seeds musician, reveals his life's ups and downs as well as his dedication to a wildlife sanctuary in the forests of Sumatra, in Justin Kurzel's documentary debut.

programme.title: Common Cause S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: As Indonesia's elderly population grows faster than the global average, Romy Hidayat creates an innovative senior care program in his community, backed by Indonesia's expat community in Australia - and their culinary skills.

programme.title: ABC Late News Weekend (2026) - EP 24
programme.desc: When you need to know what's happening turn to ABC News for coverage you can trust. Meredith Sheehan brings you the day's news by reporters in more locations across Australia, connecting communities and telling your stories.

programme.title: Offsiders (2026) - EP 8
programme.desc: For 20 years, Offsiders has been here to unpack all the action. Host Abbey Gelmi and the panel discuss the Matildas Asian Cup Semi Final against China and the Final, plus the latest in NRL, AFL, Super Netball and Super Rugby.

programme.title: The Chef's Garden S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: Chef Massimo Mele pairs delicious Tongola goat curd with freshly-picked beetroot and vegetables. Then it's into the pure Tassie waters where Massimo samples some of the world's best oysters.

programme.title: On Country Kitchen S2 - EP 4
programme.desc: It's season 2 and Derek still can't cook! With locally found ingredients, and a sprinkle of culture and character, Mark and Derek create an Indigenous-inspired feast for the people they visit along their journey.

programme.title: This Place: A View From The Shore (2019) - EP 5
programme.desc: Quandamooka songman Josh Walker tells the fascinating story of Mooloomba, also known as Point Lookout on North Stradbroke Island - a lesson for all in the tribe to follow the lore of the Old Ones.

programme.title: ABC News Overnight (2026) - EP 24
programme.desc: The final word on the day's top stories, with the latest news and updated information from Australia's most trusted source of independent news. Presented by Meredith Sheehan.

programme.title: Play On S2 - EP 2
programme.desc: Episode two sees two of the world's toughest games: footy in the Tiwi Islands and Kabaddi. A highlight for host Paul Kennedy is witnessing the monumental return to Bathurst Islands of favourite son Willie Rioli Jnr.

programme.title: Ellis Park
programme.desc: Warren Ellis, the brilliant Nick Cave and the Bad Seeds musician, reveals his life's ups and downs as well as his dedication to a wildlife sanctuary in the forests of Sumatra, in Justin Kurzel's documentary debut.

programme.title: A Brief History Of Cricket Down Under: The 80s S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: Playing cricket in the 80s Down Under was a tough assignment for visitors against a ruthless Australian team with a bruising fast bowling attack and players who attempted to psychologically destroy their opposition.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, Or Murder S6 - EP 7
programme.desc: A wealthy widow's sudden death perplexes investigators. But with conflicting causes of death and millions at stake, suspicion falls on those closest to her.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, Or Murder S6 - EP 8
programme.desc: A horse groomer’s apparent suicide is called into question years later, when a near-identical crime scene suggests a serial killer may be at work.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, Or Murder S6 - EP 9
programme.desc: An off-duty police officer calls 911 to report his wife unconscious. As suspicions mount that he may be to blame for her death, an unexpected twist changes everything.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, Or Murder S6 - EP 10
programme.desc: A 10-year-old calls 911: he shot his dad. It seems like a tragic accident-until nine years later, he reveals a darker truth.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, Or Murder S6 - EP 1
programme.desc: When a 71-year-old man is found shot dead in a field, investigators suspect his killing is the result of a robbery. But as new evidence surfaces, detectives develop a wild theory to explain his death, and only a voice from the grave can prove it.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, Or Murder S6 - EP 2
programme.desc: A woman’s sudden death in a Detroit hotel unravels a dark web of secrets, lies, and deadly coincidences that hint at something far more sinister.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, Or Murder S6 - EP 3
programme.desc: When a Navy officer succumbs to a mysterious illness after months at sea, nothing makes sense, until an autopsy yields a stunning revelation. All roads lead to dead ends, until they zero in on an unlikely target.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, Or Murder S6 - EP 4
programme.desc: A devoted husband, military man, and father of three calls the police with a chilling confession: he’s shot his wife. What first appears to be a straightforward homicide soon unravels into something far more complex.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, Or Murder S6 - EP 5
programme.desc: A massive changeover rocks the boat. A stew gets pulled in multiple and a flirty love triangle starts to heat up. The chef struggles to cater to vegan guests with particular palates and complaints.

programme.desc: What seem like two unrelated events, a truck inferno and a missing persons report, soon collide in a deadly case of mistaken identity.

programme.title: The Super Mario Bros. Movie
programme.desc: The Super Mario Bros. Movie follows Mario and Luigi on a whirlwind adventure through Mushroom Kingdom, uniting with a cast of familiar characters to defeat Bowser.

programme.title: Sight Unseen (Season 2) - EP 1
programme.desc: In the season premiere, Tess and Sunny join Jake to find the killer of an unknown bride found on a desolate beach in her wedding gown as they navigate whether they can still trust Lieutenant Bennett. Stakes rise as the bridal party's florist is found dead while our team discovers that the first victim and her grieving fiancee were once on opposite ends of the law... and running from a past that has finally caught up to them.

programme.title: FBI (Season 6) - EP 10
programme.desc: After an FDIC security guard is killed while tending to a pregnant woman in distress, the team works to locate the woman and the killer who took her hostage.

programme.title: NCIS: Sydney (Season 1) - EP 7
programme.desc: When a U.S. Navy researcher is found dead at a glitzy tech launch in a secret underground bunker, part of the team heads over to investigate, only to find themselves trapped inside with limited oxygen when the bunker fails to open.

programme.title: S.W.A.T. (Season 4) - EP 15
programme.desc: S.W.A.T. pursues a bank robbery crew that steals from the rich to help the poor. Deacon (Jay Harrington) struggles with what to do about some racist cops.

programme.title: Coroner (Season 1) - EP 7
programme.desc: A victim causes a building lockdown and Jenny (Serinda Swan) is forced to team up with a former colleague. Detective McAvoy (Roger Cross) is on the trail of a newly released inmate, determined to make his freedom short-lived.

programme.title: The Rookie (Season 7) - EP 17
programme.desc: The team helps Skip Tracer Randy when his new love interest is kidnapped. Meanwhile, Angela and Nyla enlist their moms to help catch a con artist, and Wesley is threatened to drop a case.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (Season 14) - EP 9
programme.desc: Danny gets involved when Sean becomes the latest victim in a series of robberies on Sean's college campus.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (Season 14) - EP 10
programme.desc: Danny and Gormley race to find Gus Vanderlip (Aidan Quinn), a committed detective who is dangerously determined to uncover how a rapist he arrested is back on the streets.

programme.title: The Amazing Race (Season 35) - EP 5
programme.desc: Teams travel more than 2,000 miles from Vietnam to India where they must balance traditional pots on their heads while performing a folk dance, and assemble a life-size, three-dimensional mural.

programme.title: The Amazing Race (Season 35) - EP 6
programme.desc: For the first time in The Amazing Race history, the votes for the mandatory U-turn are in, and one team must complete both detours in India, bundling up flowers and transporting building materials on rickshaws in the bustling streets of Jaipur.

programme.title: White House Down
programme.desc: While on a tour of the White House with his young daughter, a police officer (Channing Tatum) springs into action to protect his child and the president (Jamie Foxx) from a heavily armed group of paramilitary invaders.

programme.title: Boston Blue (Season 1) - EP 12
programme.desc: In BOSTON BLUE, a universe expansion of the long-running top drama BLUE BLOODS, Wahlberg will reprise his role as NYPD officer Danny Reagan as he takes a position with Boston PD. Once in Boston, he is paired with detective Lena Peters, the eldest daughter of a prominent law enforcement family.

programme.title: Sight Unseen (Season 2) - EP 2
programme.desc: A quick stop for gas turns into a parent's worst nightmare when a 6 year old boy is snatched during a carjacking. Tess and Jake race against the clock to bring the child home alive as Sunny pours all her focus away from her trauma and into the case. When Tess and Jake track down the perp in a tense OJ style pursuit, Tess's empathy defuses a potentially deadly standoff, reuniting the boy safely with his family and prompting her to reflect on her own family history.

programme.title: Elsbeth (Season 3) - EP 3
programme.desc: When "grief influencer" Raquel Drabowski's presumed-dead husband makes a miraculous return, their reunion takes a fatal plunge. Meanwhile, Elsbeth's surprise reunion with an old friend could expose a dangerous undercover operation.

programme.title: The Rookie (Season 8) - EP 11
programme.desc: John Nolan, the oldest rookie in the LAPD, has used his life experience, determination and sense of humor to keep up with rookies 20 years his junior. Nearing the end of his training, Nolan now faces his biggest challenge as a police officer when he must come to terms with the choices he has made in pursuit of the truth.

programme.title: Doc (Season 2) - EP 11
programme.desc: FBI joins the hunt for Amy's hacker. Grieving Hannah helps Amy save a poisoned patient, while Sonya and TJ uncover abuse behind a child's illness.

programme.title: The Super Mario Bros. Movie
programme.desc: The Super Mario Bros. Movie follows Mario and Luigi on a whirlwind adventure through Mushroom Kingdom, uniting with a cast of familiar characters to defeat Bowser.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior (Season 15) - EP 10
programme.desc: The semifinals wrap up in Los Angeles where the competing ninjas face up to six challenging obstacles and race head-to-head for a spot in the national finals.

programme.title: Elsbeth (Season 3) - EP 3
programme.desc: When "grief influencer" Raquel Drabowski's presumed-dead husband makes a miraculous return, their reunion takes a fatal plunge. Meanwhile, Elsbeth's surprise reunion with an old friend could expose a dangerous undercover operation.

programme.title: Red Eye (Season 2) - EP 1
programme.desc: While Hana investigates a murder at Heathrow, a threat is made against Delaney's jet.

programme.title: The Rookie (Season 8) - EP 11
programme.desc: John Nolan, the oldest rookie in the LAPD, has used his life experience, determination and sense of humor to keep up with rookies 20 years his junior. Nearing the end of his training, Nolan now faces his biggest challenge as a police officer when he must come to terms with the choices he has made in pursuit of the truth.

programme.title: Boston Blue (Season 1) - EP 10
programme.desc: Following the release of Ben's killer from prison, Jonah continues to struggle with anger and grief confronting the killer and putting family bonds to the test, and Mae and Sarah face painful truths that could change everything. Meanwhile, Danny and Lena take on a high-stakes case that uncovers deep-rooted secrets and forces unlikely alliances.

programme.title: NCIS: Origins (Season 2) - EP 11
programme.desc: Season 2 of NCIS: Origins delves deeper into the unstoppable NCIS Camp Pendleton team led by the legendary Mike Franks, as well as Gibbs' early career as a special agent, and reveals the fate of Lala after last season's devastating car crash.

programme.title: Jurassic World: Fallen Kingdom
programme.desc: Owen and Claire return to the ruins of the Jurassic World theme park to rescue the remaining dinosaurs from a looming volcanic extinction.

programme.title: White House Down
programme.desc: While on a tour of the White House with his young daughter, a police officer (Channing Tatum) springs into action to protect his child and the president (Jamie Foxx) from a heavily armed group of paramilitary invaders.

programme.title: S.W.A.T. (Season 4) - EP 12
programme.desc: Hondo (Shemar Moore) and Street (Alex Russell) wrestle with family issues as S.W.A.T. investigates the murder of a prominent journalist.

programme.title: S.W.A.T. (Season 4) - EP 13
programme.desc: As S.W.A.T. teams with the FBI to arrest the head of a Ponzi scheme, Chris (Lina Esco) hits rock bottom and Hondo (Shemar Moore) worries that he may be losing Darryl (Deshae Frost).

programme.title: The Amazing Race (Season 35) - EP 7
programme.desc: Having experienced the U-turn in India, relationships are tested as teams take on their first self-drive leg in Germany. Also, teams rappel down a castle wall and use their taste buds to identify different mustards.

programme.title: The Amazing Race (Season 35) - EP 8
programme.desc: For the first time in The Amazing Race history, teams visit the country of Slovenia. Racers will soar to new heights in glider planes, experience roadblock surprises and battle to remain in the race.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt (S1) - EP 4
programme.desc: Daren and Naana are searching for a turn-key home with a stunning ocean view. In addition, they need a location to open their dream roadside ice cream shop.

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1) - EP 4
programme.desc: An emotional Theresa finds out her father-in-law has passed and then feels his presence in the following days while shopping for Holy Water.

programme.title: Abducted In The Everglades
programme.desc: When her student daughter goes missing while on Spring Break down in Miami, Beverly flies out from Indiana to find her, acquiring the assistance of boatman Ray as they search the vast Everglades.

programme.title: Secret Life Of The Pastor's Wife
programme.desc: Angie, the wife of a charismatic pastor who extols family values yet maintains an icy demeanour toward his own, seeks solace from her marital woes in the arms of her recently hired pool boy.

programme.title: I Dream Of Jeannie S5 - EP 17
programme.desc: Jeannie crashes the Isolation Chamber and becomes a creature from outer space.

programme.title: I Dream Of Jeannie S5 - EP 18
programme.desc: When Roger spreads the news that the stork is to visit the Nelson household, he doesn't know that Mrs. Djinn-Djinn, the genie dog, is the object of the visit -- not Jeannie.

programme.title: I Dream Of Jeannie S5 - EP 19
programme.desc: Curiosity captures Jeannie, Tony and Roger bring her back.

programme.title: I Dream Of Jeannie S5 - EP 20
programme.desc: Jeannie tries to get Tony the Best Husband Award and almost makes him the Worst Astronaut.

programme.title: The Waltons S3 - EP 21
programme.desc: John Walton's dream of a Walton & Sons lumber business is shattered when Jason, like his elder brother John-Boy, decides to pursue his own career.

programme.title: The Waltons S3 - EP 22
programme.desc: John-Boy is faced with the agonizing possibility of destroying spinster Emily Baldwin's lifelong romantic dream in order to make his first literary sale.Grandpa wins a statue that bears an uncanny resemblance to one of his former girlfriends.

programme.title: Mission Impossible S2 - EP 14
programme.desc: The resurgence of neo-Nazism in Germany takes the IMF to Bavaria where Marcus von Frank threatens to become a second Hitler.

programme.title: Mission Impossible S2 - EP 15
programme.desc: The imagination of the IMF is put to the test when a massive spy ring in the U.S. headed by fashion photographer David Redding threatens to cripple the country with a deadly pneumonic plague.

programme.title: Mission Impossible S2 - EP 16
programme.desc: NATO's missile defense system plans mapped on two separate overlays for security reasons are the target of a Central European spy organization.

programme.title: Mission Impossible S2 - EP 17
programme.desc: Recovering a million dollars in gold bullion is the job of the IMF.

programme.title: Xena: Warrior Princess S2 - EP 10
programme.desc: In 1940, two archaeologists look for the legendary scrolls that Gabrielle wrote about her adventures with Xena.

programme.title: Xena: Warrior Princess S2 - EP 11
programme.desc: A fragile peace may be derailed by behind-the-scenes mayhem at a beauty pageant, in which the rulers of all three former enemies have entered their girlfriends as contestants.

programme.title: Xena: Warrior Princess S2 - EP 12
programme.desc: Xena is seriously hurt in Cirra's ruins by a huge log and she enters into a coma. While Gabrielle carries her to a doctoe, she remembers how ten winters ago she met Julius Caesar and became the Destroyer of Nations.

programme.title: Law & Order Special Victims Unit S11 - EP 4

programme.title: Law & Order Special Victims Unit S11 - EP 5

programme.desc: When a young couple is found murdered in the back of a padlocked truck, the SVU team investigates the scene and link the male victim to a dangerous Mexican drug cartel.

programme.desc: Rodney shows off his haggling expertise at the flea market, but before long he's given away all of Andy's money.

programme.desc: Rodney and Mr. J both want to help Andy win the melon-crate derby, but they want it so much that they forget to include him when they build their carts.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: While on a camping trip with the Badger Scouts, Andy makes a fun new enemy--the annoying Kyle Finkster!

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: The other pets in the pet parade can do lots of cool, exciting tricks, which makes Rodney look bad.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1 - EP 7
programme.desc: After Rodney is accidentally left behind while the Johnson's are on vacation, he goes to bunk with Leon in the wild.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1 - EP 8
programme.desc: Rodney and Mr. J become managers of rival baseball teams, but neither will let Andy play.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1 - EP 9
programme.desc: Andy and Rodney have a falling out and hold auditions to find new best friends.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1 - EP 10
programme.desc: Andy and Rodney compete to be the faces of Furlock, a new pet hair gel from international hair icon and fancypants, Manzio.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1 - EP 11
programme.desc: Andy and Rodney are determined to stay up all night in order to see the legendary Yellow Flash in the sky.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1 - EP 12
programme.desc: Building a pool in the backyard would wreck Leon's tree, which is the last thing Rodney wants.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1 - EP 13
programme.desc: An accident strands Rodney on a deserted island. Except it's the kind of 'island' you find in the street.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1 - EP 14
programme.desc: The night before he's to give an important speech, Mr. J loses his voice while laughing too hard at a silly singing cow movie that Rodney insisted he watch.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1 - EP 15
programme.desc: Andy tries to bridge the gap between Rodney and his father through the timeless art of karaoke.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1 - EP 16
programme.desc: Rodney's attempt to fix the air conditioner goes terribly wrong, leaving him trapped in the walls of the house.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1 - EP 17
programme.desc: Rodney's special time at the circus with Darlene is ruined by the arrival of Rodney's Cousin Eddie.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1 - EP 18
programme.desc: Andy is practically blind after losing his glasses, but all his other senses suddenly start working much better.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1 - EP 19
programme.desc: When a cereal box provides the location of buried treasure, Andy and Rodney must make peace with their arch-enemies Kyle and Salty Mike to dig it up.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1 - EP 20
programme.desc: Rodney enlists Leon and Darlene to join The Rod Squad, whose heroic mission is to prevent Andy from getting in trouble with Mrs. J. After donning ridiculous outfits and infiltrating a sticky bun warehouse, things start to get very silly.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1 - EP 21
programme.desc: Rodney really is the perfect pet... until the arrival of Archie, a rabbit who REALLY is the perfect pet.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1 - EP 22
programme.desc: Much to his delight, Rodney learns he is an endangered species, whose every whim must be catered to. Much to his chagrin, Mr. J learns Rodney is an endangered species, whose every whim must be catered to.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1 - EP 23
programme.desc: It's Andy's birthday, and wouldn't you know it, what with all the lounging and the resting and the napping, Rodney totally forgot!

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 2
programme.desc: Po's new life as The Dragon Warrior is threatened by the emergence of a formidable villain determined to conquer China and destroy Kung Fu.

programme.title: Top Chef S17 - EP 9
programme.desc: The chefs head to the mountains, a few hours outside of Los Angeles to go to Summer Camp where they are challenged to an outdoor grilling Quickfire for Padma and "Top Chef" Kentucky winner Kelsey Barnard Clark. Before the sun rises, the chefs get to work on an upscale brunch buffet for 200 moms vacationing at the camp using a very limited stock pantry.

programme.title: Top Chef S17 - EP 10
programme.desc: With only six chefs remaining, the challenges get even more difficult, when pastry super-chef Sherry Yard awaits the All Stars for a dreaded dessert Quickfire, made even more impossible when chefs must endure a blindfolded taste test to pick their ingredients. Then Michelin-starred Chefs/Restaurateurs Niki and Carole Lidi-Nakayama demonstrate a traditional Japanese Kaiseki meal, the ultimate in simplicity, restraint and precision.

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 1
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 2
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC’s ‘The Exchange’ is the newsroom-based program for today’s investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC’s "The Exchange" is the newsroom-based program for today’s Investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, "Power Lunch" delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, "Power Lunch" delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 1
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, "Closing Bell" guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 2
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, "Closing Bell" guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime - EP 1
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. "Closing Bell: Overtime" takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime - EP 2
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. "Closing Bell: Overtime" takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: Fast Money - EP 1
programme.desc: "Fast Money" is America’s post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, "Fast Money" breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

programme.title: Fast Money - EP 2
programme.desc: "Fast Money" is America’s post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, "Fast Money" breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

programme.title: CNBC On Assignment
programme.desc: CNBC goes on assignment at the biggest events around the world, bringing you interviews and insight from the most influential leaders in business, politics, activism and the arts.

programme.title: The Tech Download
programme.desc: Hosted by Arjun Kharpal and Steve Kovach, CNBC's "Tech Download" podcast cuts through the noise to unpack the technology stories that matter most. With access to industry leaders and years of experience covering the biggest tech news, Arjun and Steve deliver sharp analysis and compelling narratives on the trends, risks and innovations shaping tech.

programme.title: CNBC Meets
programme.desc: Hosted by Tania Bryer, "CNBC Meets" is an intimate interview series that takes viewers inside the lives and legacies of trailblazers across business, entertainment, sport and politics. Each episode offers rare access to their homes, offices and empires - uncovering the ambitions, challenges and entrepreneurial mindsets that shaped their success and continue to drive them forward.

programme.title: Leaders Playbook
programme.desc: Through candid, in-depth interviews with America’s top CEOs, CNBC’s Senior Media & Tech Correspondent Julia Boorstin explores the leadership philosophies, strategic decisions and personal decisions that have shaped today’s most influential companies.

programme.title: The Trading Guru and His Money-Losing Disciples

programme.title: China's Controversial $167 Billion Mega-Dam
programme.desc: In one of the most earthquake-prone regions on Earth, where the Tibetan Plateau meets the Himalayas, China is building a colossal hydropower system, pushing engineering and geopolitics to the limit.

programme.title: Who Will Fill Jamie Dimon's Shoes?
programme.desc: With a $4.6 trillion balance sheet, JPMorgan is more valuable than its three biggest rivals combined. And much of the bank’s success is arguably due to its long-time leader, Jamie Dimon.

programme.title: The Rise of America's ICE Towns
programme.desc: Small towns are at the center of President Donald Trump's mass deportation campaign, spearheaded by ICE. In one rural New Mexico county, officials are grappling with what it means to be an ICE town.

programme.title: Sex-for-Work Claims in West Africa's Rubber Industry
programme.desc: An activist seeking to address the alleged abuses contends she has been targeted with litigation to keep her quiet, which the company denied.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: World Insight with Tian Wei
programme.desc: World Insight with Tian Wei is a long-running international platform for debate and intelligent discussion. It is the meeting point of both the highly influential and rising voices, facilitated by host, Tian Wei. Every Monday to Friday, it provides nutrition to form your own thoughts and ideas through live debate and interviews. Live debates linking movers and shakers take place in the signature segment "Global Debate".

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: Dialogue
programme.desc: Dialogue is a prime time daily English talk show on CGTN. The 30-minute talk show covers a wide range of domestic and international topics, providing a balanced and critical perspective on current affairs and analysis within the framework of cross-cultural and multi-disciplinary comparisons. Inviting decision makers in government, business and academia onto the show, the host encourages guests to speak their minds frankly.

programme.title: Global Business
programme.desc: The flagship business program of CGTN’s English language service. The program offers in-depth analysis of the latest economic data, business trends and market moving policies, zooming in on how all this affects ordinary people. With separate editions out of Asia, Europe, Africa and the Americas, Global Business features analysts and news-makers supported through a global network of correspondents. Global Business shows you what's moving markets in both developed and emerging economies.

programme.title: The Point with Liu Xin
programme.desc: The Point with LIU Xin is a current affairs program on CGTN. The program comments on global news through LIU Xin’s very own unique perspective. With two decades of experience as a news anchor and overseas correspondent, LIU Xin has an engaging and personal style. The Point with LIU Xin connects world audience through social media, enhancing their participation as well as offering a comprehensive perspective on world events.

programme.title: Americas Now
programme.desc: Americas Now profiles the development, diversity and challenges facing the Americas, particularly Latin America. The strength of the program is its storytelling. Correspondents across the region present insightful, well-researched and engaging narratives. Americas Now is a compelling, authoritative and balanced voice from the region, giving CGTN a competitive edge in the North American media market.

programme.title: The Heat
programme.desc: The Heat is a daily talk show anchored from Washington, D.C. It focuses on top stories making news globally. The Heat presents tough issues from a comprehensive, balanced and international and Chinese perspective. Guests from on the spot and around the world ensure lively debate and a range of voices. Wherever the story is happening, The Heat is there.

programme.title: China 24
programme.desc: China 24 is a prime time news program featuring in-depth reports and analysis of the stories in the headlines in China. Produced by CGTN’s studios in Beijing and Washington D.C., the show takes a compelling and comprehensive look at China. It explores the country’s business, politics, technology, culture, entertainment and more. China 24 tackles head-on the issues that matter most to the nation and its people, with topical reports highlighting challenges facing this fast-changing country.

programme.title: Sports Scene

programme.title: Travelogue
programme.desc: Travelogue is a 30-minute travel program. Through the journeys of our intrepid hosts, we experience the beauty, culture and mystery of China, discovering how people live in this vast country and showcasing China's transformation to the world._x000D__x000D__x000D_

programme.title: Global Watch
programme.desc: GLOBAL WATCH is a 60 minute-long news program. The show stresses Chinese elements, emphasizing China’s perspective, policies and stories. The program, relying on global reporting resources, presents in-depth analysis and coverage of major global issues, from a Chinese perspective on international affairs. The program presents to-the-point interpretation of Chinese policies and stories that are of interest to foreign audiences, in a style they are familiar with.

programme.title: Big Story
programme.desc: Big Story is a documentary film program on CGTN. It explores global events with in a variety of filmic styles and featuring original, in-depth, thought-provoking storytelling. The program provides a unique platform for the best current affairs documentaries from around the globe. Big Story aims to present the contemporary world and China’s global perspectives on the contemporary world to an international audience.

programme.title: Inheritors
programme.desc: Inheritors is a multi-media product from CGTN that shines a light on China’s rich Intangible Cultural Heritage. programme.desc: Africa Live is a news program that focuses on African issues and issues related to this diverse continent. CGTN’s Nairobi-based broadcast center produces Africa Live. programme.title: Historical Drama "BROTHERS IN ARMS" Ep. 10 (R)
programme.desc: Nobunaga finally conquers Mino, and Hanbei becomes a retainer of Tokichiro. Meanwhile, Akechi Mitsuhide (Kaname Jun) visits Nobunaga as an envoy of Ashikaga Yoshiaki, asking him to defeat the Miyoshi clan, who killed the previous shogun, and escort Yoshiaki to Kyoto to install him as the next shogun. Nobunaga accepts the request and marries his sister Ichi to Azai Nagamasa (Nakajima Ayumu) to secure peace, as Nagamasa could obstruct his march to the capital.

programme.title: Special Drama "A Novelist's Diary" (R)
programme.desc: The bestselling mystery novelist Serizawa Kan (Itao Itsuji) has died. Eto Megumi (Kaho), who had long hoped to become his editor, learns from his wife, Serizawa Mariko (Sylvia Grab), that he left behind a diary. To her surprise, it contains warm, intimate entries unlike anything in his writing - passages secretly added by Mariko, revealing her hidden feelings for her late husband. Desperate in her faltering career, Megumi makes Mariko a proposal that crosses the line of editorial ethics.

programme.title: Satoyama Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Nobuko, her cameraman husband Makoto, and their cat Tama take us on a tasty journey of local cuisine served with a side of seasonal scenery at the Satoyama Kitchen guesthouse in Hida Takayama.

programme.title: The Key to a Kitty's Heart
programme.desc: This special programme invites us to learn about wildlife photographer Iwago Mitsuaki's craft and the secret to a kitty's heart - Iwago and the cast discuss the incredible tie between humans and cats.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: The World Heritage Sites in Japan
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan presents a variety of short programmes focusing on Japan and Asia.

programme.title: The Masterpieces of Tsutaju
programme.desc: This series presents the masterpieces of Tsutaju, a brilliant ukiyo-e producer of the Edo period - this episode spotlights ukiyo-e artist Sharaku's debut work 'The Actor Otani Oniji III as Edobei'.

programme.title: Direct Talk
programme.desc: Akasaka Yogetsu, a priest with an international following, is known for combining beatboxing with Buddhist mantras. He talks about Zen philosophy and the spirit of "living in the here and now."

programme.title: Impacts: Climates Change the World
programme.desc: Urban intrusions by bears have increased significantly worldwide in recent years - what's behind this phenomenon, and how is it related to global warming? We focus our investigation on cases in Japan.

programme.title: Ukiyo-e Edo-Life
programme.desc: Ritual Purification at Roben Falls: We journey to a sacred mountain where pilgrims are purifying themselves in a waterfall before moving on - it turns out that some of them have something to prove...

programme.title: Medical Frontiers
programme.desc: GLP-1 receptor agonists are becoming a game changer in the treatment of obesity. However, using them without medical supervision is risky. We report on the potential of GLP-1 treatment.

programme.title: Trailblazers
programme.desc: Noren director Nakamura Shin draws on the skills of traditional artisans to produce original pieces. We follow him as he explores the history of noren and strives to share its culture with the world.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Matsuri: The Heartbeat of Japan
programme.desc: Gojinjo Taiko is a wild and powerful performance by masked drummers - it originated 400 years ago when villagers disguised themselves as oni (demons) to scare away a warlord's army.

programme.title: Time-Lapse Japan
programme.desc: The delicious bonito Tosa is known for spoils easily, and the flavour varies greatly. Fishmongers at a local port know exactly how to spot the best ones. Watch them in action, in time-lapse.

programme.title: Design X Stories
programme.desc: Today's theme: Astonishing Stairs. Creators have taken a simple structure that lets us climb, and imbued it with new significance. Explore the surprising beauty of stairs through architecture and art.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Trails to Oishii Tokyo 10min.
programme.desc: Peaches take the spotlight - from June to October, new varieties appear every two weeks letting people enjoy them for months. Big, sweet and juicy, discover the charm of Japan's finest peaches.

programme.title: Nun's Cookbook
programme.desc: The nuns of Otowasan Kannonji Temple teach us how to make gohei-mochi rice cakes - wrap rice around cedar sticks, grill over charcoal, spread homemade miso and enjoy the savoury taste of autumn.

programme.title: Asia Insight
programme.desc: Bangladesh has held its first general election since anti-government protests in which 1,400 protestors were killed. We join young voters who carry on the will of those who lost their lives.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Nun's Seasonal Calendar
programme.desc: In this episode, we learn about the early spring dates of Risshun and Usui - the nuns show us how to make the seasonal specialities of neko-mochi rice cakes and Girls' Day crackers.

programme.title: The Masterpieces of Tsutaju
programme.desc: This miniseries presents the masterpieces of Tsutaju, a brilliant ukiyo-e producer of the Edo period - this episode takes a close look at artist Utamaro's iconic 'Woman with a Glass Noisemaker'.

programme.title: The Key to a Kitty's Heart
programme.desc: This special programme invites us to learn about wildlife photographer Iwago Mitsuaki's craft and the secret to a kitty's heart - Iwago and the cast discuss the incredible tie between humans and cats.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Education Chance Opens the World
programme.desc: Maxine is a university student who joined a school providing educational support and life advice to international students wanting to enter Japanese high school, and this experience changed her life.

programme.title: Japan's Top Inventions
programme.desc: Discover the stories behind renowned Japanese products alongside our reporter - this time, frozen food vending machines.

programme.title: Grand Sumo Highlights
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan presents a sumo highlights programme for fans around the globe featuring all top-division bouts from Day 13 of the latest Grand Sumo tournament in Osaka.

programme.title: Sumopedia
programme.desc: Sumopedia enriches your sumo experience with information on the techniques, traditions and famous wrestlers of the past. The rules may be simple but there is a lot more to sumo than meets the eye.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: The Unbreakable Silence
programme.desc: The Supreme Court ruled Japan's defunct Eugenic Protection Law as unconstitutional in July 2024 - we look into why many of the victims who were forcefully sterilised remain silent on their suffering.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: A Samurai in Time
programme.desc: A novice filmmaker bet everything on a period drama-and won 7 Japan Academy Awards! "A Samurai in Time" is an against-all-odds story of passion, grit, and samurai spirit.

programme.title: Framing Everyday Moments
programme.desc: A unique time-lapse photography project. Shot by pros and non-pros from around the world, on the transience of nature, celestial phenomena, cityscapes and each single moment of everyday life.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Cycle Around Japan
programme.desc: We picked our 10 favourite rides from previous episodes and asked our viewers to rank them - these are the results with commentary from our cyclists, a virtual race, and lots of other extras to enjoy.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Design X Stories
programme.desc: Today's theme: Astonishing Stairs. Creators have taken a simple structure that lets us climb, and imbued it with new significance. Explore the surprising beauty of stairs through architecture and art.

programme.title: The Wakey Show
programme.desc: A selection of acclaimed programmes from NHK's domestic channels dubbed into English.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Magical Japanese
programme.desc: The Japanese language is rich in words and expressions influenced by nature, history, and culture - this episode looks at words related to the bow and arrow. Explore the unique culture behind them.

programme.title: The Seasons of Yamato
programme.desc: A series of poetic videos by Koichi Hozan, a videographer living in Nara, in collaboration with pianist Mine Kawakami - for which she plays exclusive pieces - helps you experience each season.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Face to Face
programme.desc: Yoshioka Sarasa revives ancient plant-based colors in Kyoto. As natural dyes grow scarce, she preserves their legacy while creating layered works that reveal new dimensions of nature's hues.

programme.title: Bosai: Science That Can Save Your Life
programme.desc: Bear encounters are happening more frequently all over Japan. We'll look at new technologies to reduce the danger they pose, such as GPS tracking and an AI model that predicts bear encounters.

programme.title: Design Museum Japan
programme.desc: Yamanashi / Shibata Fumie (product designer). "Kaiki" is a thin, brightly coloured silk fabric. Shibata discovers how threads are arranged to produce a layered effect that resembles a digital image.

programme.title: Nosari: Gifts from Mountain Gods
programme.desc: In Shiiba village, people believe that everything, good or bad, is "Nosari,"a gift from the gods. This is a year-long record of mountain life that embodies the essence of traditional Japan.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Himari: A Rising Violin Virtuoso
programme.desc: Global attention turns to 14-year-old Japanese violinist Himari. Follow the young prodigy after her world debut as she performs with many of the world's finest orchestras.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: J-Melo
programme.desc: Join May J. for great Japanese music! This week, three exciting young acts who are all on the rise: Omiya Hiyori, GOOD BYE APRIL, and nishina. Plus, May J. sings!

programme.title: Herbal Symphony
programme.desc: Discover Japan's oldest private medicinal herb garden in Uda - here the natural landscape from 300 years ago is preserved in a botanical time capsule as a sanctuary of local culture and history.

programme.title: Japanology Plus mini
programme.desc: Octopuses have been part of the Japanese diet for centuries. Today, some people even keep them as pets. Octopus catches have been decreasing, but efforts to farm them on land are now underway.

programme.title: A Cat's-Eye View of Japan
programme.desc: The seaside town of Hakodate has long flourished as a port - one savvy cat waits by a fisherman hoping he'll share his catch! We also meet more local cats at a fish market and a historic graveyard.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Anime Manga Explosion
programme.desc: The spotlight's on MAO, the latest from manga legend Takahashi Rumiko. Featuring handwritten comments from Takahashi, we go behind the scenes of the upcoming anime and the team bringing it to life.

programme.title: Texico
programme.desc: Learn programming principles without a computer! Animated characters provide fun and lucid explanations of five core processes: analysis, combination, generalisation, abstraction and simulation.

programme.title: I Love 'Mee'
programme.desc: Today is Mee's birthday. Everyone offers birthday wishes, but Mee wonders, "Why do we say 'Happy Birthday'?" So Papa decides to take Mee on a drive to retrace "The Story of Mee's Birth."

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: The World Heritage Sites in Japan
programme.desc: An astonishing 49 burial mounds of various shapes and sizes are scattered across Osaka - these 1,600-year-old mounds are the resting places of past rulers and elites. Research reveals new discoveries.

programme.title: Time-Lapse Japan
programme.desc: Okinawa Prefecture is a group of subtropical islands in the far south of Japan. We examine its past and present, with footage from time-lapse creator Shimizu Daisuke. This time: The Holiest Place.

programme.title: Grand Sumo Highlights

programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Anime Pilgrims
programme.desc: Cosplayer Yuriko Tiger heads to Hokkaido to explore the real locations behind the hit anime Golden Kamuy. Discover the hidden history of Otaru and the rich traditions of the indigenous Ainu people.

programme.title: Core Kyoto Mini
programme.desc: The Maki-e lacquering technique uses gold dust on a jet-black background to dazzling effect.

programme.title: Easy Japanese for Work
programme.desc: This time: Asking how to pronounce names. Whang-san works at a trading company; to become a reliable businessman, he learns a valuable business trick: asking the pronunciation of a person's name.

programme.title: Zero Waste Life
programme.desc: Chiba is known for peanuts - area leather goods seller Iijima Satoshi uses discarded peanut skins from local farmers to make synthetic leather that's eco-friendly, durable and very versatile.

programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Nosari: Gifts from Mountain Gods
programme.desc: In Shiiba village, people believe that everything, good or bad, is "Nosari,"a gift from the gods. This is a year-long record of mountain life that embodies the essence of traditional Japan.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Himari: A Rising Violin Virtuoso
programme.desc: Global attention turns to 14-year-old Japanese violinist Himari. Follow the young prodigy after her world debut as she performs with many of the world's finest orchestras.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Anime Manga Explosion
programme.desc: The spotlight's on MAO, the latest from manga legend Takahashi Rumiko. Featuring handwritten comments from Takahashi, we go behind the scenes of the upcoming anime and the team bringing it to life.

programme.title: Texico
programme.desc: Learn programming principles without a computer! Animated characters provide fun and lucid explanations of five core processes: analysis, combination, generalisation, abstraction and simulation.

programme.title: I Love 'Mee'
programme.desc: Today is Mee's birthday. Everyone offers birthday wishes, but Mee wonders, "Why do we say 'Happy Birthday'?" So Papa decides to take Mee on a drive to retrace "The Story of Mee's Birth."

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: J-Melo
programme.desc: Join May J. for great Japanese music! This week, three exciting young acts who are all on the rise: Omiya Hiyori, GOOD BYE APRIL, and nishina. Plus, May J. sings!

programme.title: Herbal Symphony
programme.desc: Discover Japan's oldest private medicinal herb garden in Uda - here the natural landscape from 300 years ago is preserved in a botanical time capsule as a sanctuary of local culture and history.

programme.title: Japanology Plus mini
programme.desc: Octopuses have been part of the Japanese diet for centuries. Today, some people even keep them as pets. Octopus catches have been decreasing, but efforts to farm them on land are now underway.

programme.title: A Cat's-Eye View of Japan
programme.desc: The seaside town of Hakodate has long flourished as a port - one savvy cat waits by a fisherman hoping he'll share his catch! We also meet more local cats at a fish market and a historic graveyard.

programme.title: Unkind Ladies - EP 15
programme.desc: Unkind Ladies follows three generations of strong-willed women in one household led by matriarch Kang Sunok, and the ups and downs in their careers, love lives and family relationships.

programme.title: 2026 New Taipei City Wan Jin Shi Marathon
programme.desc: The 2026 New Taipei City Wan Jin Shi Marathon will take place on March 15! As Taiwan's first road race to earn the World Athletics "Gold Label" certification, this event starts from Wanli and winds along the breathtaking North Coast toward Jinshan. Combining stunning ocean views with challenging terrain, it is hailed by runners as "Taiwan's Most Beautiful Coastal Marathon.

programme.title: The Kwoks And What - EP 19

programme.title: Pretty Dangerous & What's On Today - EP 20
programme.desc: Undercover cop Pan Yifeng leads three elite female agents - the Sherlock-like Shen Jiaqi, martial artist Jiang Miaozhi, and data whiz Tong Xiaoru - to bust a "Fairy Dust" drug ring near tycoon Liu Biao's circle.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2768
programme.desc: Hung Shu-Kan owns a logistics business. The only thing on his mind is the well-being of his three daughters. His eldest daughter has moved abroad, but his second youngest daughter, Yuek-Shui, is still single. She and her little sister Sum-Yue often squabble, putting their father in a dilemma.

programme.title: Shining Just for You - EP 24
programme.desc: Ye Ling Shuang is a young woman who can foresee great tragedies and disasters before they happen. What will she do in the face of her "curse" as well as the Emperor's demands?

programme.desc: The hungriest and most ruthless food competition ever! In this groundbreaking show, contestants must embrace the challenge of conquering their hunger to become the ultimate winner. With a relentless pursuit of zero hunger, only the strongest will emerge victorious!

programme.title: Golden City
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: Woori The Virgin - EP 2
programme.desc: Oh Woori (Im Soo Hyang) vowed to remain a virgin until she marries, and has shied away from romantic relationships in a bid to remain chaste. A terrible mixup takes place during her routine checkup and she is accidentally artificially inseminated!

programme.title: Fight For Love - EP 16
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Falsely accused noblewoman Chu Yu (Victoria Song) teams up with Wei Yun (Ding Yuxi) to uncover a military massacre’s truth; amid war and palace intrigue, they fall in love while defending their homeland.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2172
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: Homeland Guardian - EP 4
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Legendary Hong Kong police officer Ho Ho Fai (Jordan Chan), known for his role as one of the Three Tigers, faces a dramatic fall from grace after a failed mission. Joining the Special Duties Unit, he and his team, fight to uncover and thwart a plot against Hong Kong’s financial system.

programme.title: Legend of the Magnate - EP 32
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Gu Ping Yuan (Chen Xiao), framed and exiled after failing the imperial exam, escapes with a salt caravan and rises as a daring merchant. He uncovers hidden plots, and discovers that the conspiracy that ruined him was actually aimed at the Li family.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2172
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: Hilarious Family - EP 9
programme.desc: This heartwarming drama tells the story of Du Ruyu (Liu Lin), a single mother who has been widowed for 18 years, raising her four daughters, each with very different personalities, on her own. The family is filled with both laughter and tears.

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 801-850) VVD Mandarin - EP 844
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: Gone With The Rain - EP 18
programme.desc: In the ancient Jing, a young Emperor has just ascended but the state is torn apart by a tumultuous rebellion. In this harsh world, Mo Xi (Zhang Nan), the niece of Official Bai, and her cousin Bai Feng Yao (Wang Yu Wen) team up to avoid a terrible fate.

programme.title: A Journey to Love - EP 11
programme.desc: The story revolves the top assassins from Wu nation and their diversly skilled six-member team embarking on a journey filled with challenges and crises.

programme.title: A Journey to Love - EP 12
programme.desc: The story revolves the top assassins from Wu nation and their diversly skilled six-member team embarking on a journey filled with challenges and crises.

programme.title: Heroes In White - EP 20
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Sai-hang kidnaps Wing-sum and Yee-ting. Sai-hang demands a ransom of HK$10 million from Wai-man and warns him not to call the police. Wai-man and Yin-cho go the exchange location with the ransom. But they only see Yee-ting. Yin-cho gets hurt as he has a fight with Sai-hang.

programme.title: Homeland Guardian - EP 1
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Legendary Hong Kong police officer Ho Ho Fai (Jordan Chan), known for his role as one of the Three Tigers, faces a dramatic fall from grace after a failed mission. programme.title: IDOL I - EP 1
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A tale unfolds around star attorney Maeng Se Na (Choi Soo Young), once a devoted longtime fan herself, who steps up to defend her idol Do Ra Ik (Kim Jae Young) after he is falsely accused of murder, setting off a chain of events that follows.

programme.title: My Sweet Mobster - EP 2
programme.desc: Ex-gangster Seo Ji Hwan (Um Tae Goo) runs a company hiring ex-gang members to help reform their lives. Go Eun-Ha (Han Sun Hwa), a children's YouTube creator, accidentally injures him while working a part-time cleaning job. To her surprise, he recognizes her!

programme.title: Dear Enemy - EP 2
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Dear Enemy tells the story of two former college friends, Luo Man and Chen Kai Xi, who became bitter rivals after they reunite many years later. But through conflicts in both work and life, they eventually reconcile and grow together along the way.

programme.title: My Sweet Mobster - EP 4
programme.desc: Ex-gangster Seo Ji Hwan (Um Tae Goo) runs a company hiring ex-gang members to help reform their lives. Go Eun-Ha (Han Sun Hwa), a children's YouTube creator, accidentally injures him while working a part-time cleaning job. To her surprise, he recognizes her!

programme.title: The King Of Snooker - EP 10
programme.desc: The all-conquering snooker player YAU YAT KIU (Cheng Siu Chau, Adam) takes everyone by surprise when he suddenly retires from the snooker world. This comes as a huge disappointed to her daughter YAU KA KAN (Niki Chow), who has always wanted to follow in his footsteps. She feels bewildered too, for although KIU pretends he does not care about the snooker any more, he has set up an extremely difficult game in his restaurant.

programme.title: Brick Slaves - EP 20
programme.desc: LAU YIU-MING (Vincent Wong) exhausts the money that he and his girlfriend have saved for many years to buy a property and is about to get married. Out of the blue, his girlfriend not only wants to break up with him, but also secretly leases the premises out to a piano teacher, CHOI KIN-CHING (Selena Li). Unfortunately, YIU-MING's bad day gets even worse as he is soon laid off from work.

programme.title: Unchained Medley - EP 5
programme.desc: Pop musician Ding Yat-chun (Owen Cheung) is often troubled by nightmares. He then gets embroiled in a plagiarism scandal, so he moves to a small village for the time being as he also wants to relax. Yat-chun unwittingly opens an old Cantonese opera costume trunk in the village house, releasing the ghost of opera diva Wan Lau-fong (Katy Kung). In the 1990s, Lau-fong was a Cantonese opera diva, but she passed away due to some accident. Lau-fong has forgotten almost everything about her human life.

programme.title: Rosy Business - EP 16
programme.desc: HONG PO KEI’s (Tang Shui Man, Sheren) engagement with Wuxi rice baron TSEUNG KIU (Yueh Wah) broke off many years ago when a natural disaster hit the country. Later when the country was running out of food supply her whole family was killed and she become a criminal. Over the years, KEI has never got over KIU. She has been trying to prove he is not as heartless as the others think. Fate has it that they meet again and she becomes his fourth wife.

programme.title: Storm In A Cocoon - EP 22
programme.desc: Wing Tai Lung is the silk kingdom in Canton during the early years of Republic China. Its owner POON WING-NIN (Yueh Hua), because of his advanced age, has handed over the charge to his elder son POON KA-HIN (Evergreen Mak) and daughter POON HAU-YEE (Hong Wah). Out of the blue, HAU-YEE commits suicide, so his second son POON KA-YEUNG (Steven Ma), who was serving as a combat medic, returns to his hometown, taking over the reins.

programme.title: Storm In A Cocoon - EP 23
programme.desc: Wing Tai Lung is the silk kingdom in Canton during the early years of Republic China. programme.title: The Silver Chamber Of Sorrows - EP 10
programme.desc: "Sheung’s Silver Chamber", the largest jewel company in Foshan, Guangdong Province China, is facing serious financial difficulties. In order to obtain a loan from SHUM’s family, SHEUNG HANG (Chun Pui), owner of the Chamber, together with his primary wife, CHOI SIU-DIP (Sit Ka Yin), plot to arrange marriage between SHEUNG WAN (Ng Wai Kwok), HANG’s younger brother, and SHUM WING-TUNG (Young Yuen Yee), daughter of SHUM’s family.

programme.title: Hong Kong Love Stories - EP 5
programme.desc: Nice guy designer Chan Tsz-long (Joey Law) and his idealist girlfriend Yau Hoi-kei (Katy Kung) are a typical Hong Kong couple reluctantly living an unsettled life due to land issues. Tsz-long’s two younger sisters Chan Tsz-yan (Venus Wong) and Chan Tsz-ting (Kayan Yau) are polar opposites. Photographer Tsz-yan keeps indulging in artist Ki Ka-hei’s (Brian Tse) decadent paradise. Well-behaved and diligent college goddess Tsz-ting adopts a realistic approach when she finds her first love.

programme.title: The Ultimate Addiction - EP 6
programme.desc: Financial elite, CHEUK YUK (Bosco Wong), never hesitates to use any dirty tricks to gain a profit, so he has been under close surveillance by the Commercial Crime Bureau (CCB). Being obsessed with money and power, CHEUK YUK constantly neglects his family members and friends. Because of him, his wife and mentor pass away respectively, yet he shows no remorse at all. On the contrary, his craving for money and power continuously increases.

programme.title: The Ultimate Addiction - EP 7
programme.desc: Financial elite, CHEUK YUK (Bosco Wong), never hesitates to use any dirty tricks to gain a profit, so he has been under close surveillance by the Commercial Crime Bureau (CCB). Being obsessed with money and power, CHEUK YUK constantly neglects his family members and friends. Because of him, his wife and mentor pass away respectively, yet he shows no remorse at all. On the contrary, his craving for money and power continuously increases.

programme.title: The Legend Of Master Chai - EP 19
programme.desc: In Heaven, Chai (Leung Wing Chun) killed Huen (Ho Po Sang) over a pot of sweet lotus seed soup. He was expelled to earth to suffer, while at the same time, he had to help Huen and Nui, who were also sent down to earth, to regain their powers._x000D__x000D_Chai was punished to become the stupid and shabby son, of an earthly man. Huen, on the other hand, was his handsome and clever brother, who was loved by all. One day, Chai regained his magic power and started to challenge Huen.

programme.title: The Legend Of Master Chai - EP 20

programme.title: Hong Kong Love Stories - EP 5
programme.desc: Nice guy designer Chan Tsz-long (Joey Law) and his idealist girlfriend Yau Hoi-kei (Katy Kung) are a typical Hong Kong couple reluctantly living an unsettled life due to land issues. Tsz-long’s two younger sisters Chan Tsz-yan (Venus Wong) and Chan Tsz-ting (Kayan Yau) are polar opposites. Photographer Tsz-yan keeps indulging in artist Ki Ka-hei’s (Brian Tse) decadent paradise. Well-behaved and diligent college goddess Tsz-ting adopts a realistic approach when she finds her first love.

programme.title: The Ultimate Addiction - EP 6
programme.desc: Financial elite, CHEUK YUK (Bosco Wong), never hesitates to use any dirty tricks to gain a profit, so he has been under close surveillance by the Commercial Crime Bureau (CCB). Being obsessed with money and power, CHEUK YUK constantly neglects his family members and friends. Because of him, his wife and mentor pass away respectively, yet he shows no remorse at all. On the contrary, his craving for money and power continuously increases.

programme.title: The Ultimate Addiction - EP 7
programme.desc: Financial elite, CHEUK YUK (Bosco Wong), never hesitates to use any dirty tricks to gain a profit, so he has been under close surveillance by the Commercial Crime Bureau (CCB). Being obsessed with money and power, CHEUK YUK constantly neglects his family members and friends. Because of him, his wife and mentor pass away respectively, yet he shows no remorse at all. On the contrary, his craving for money and power continuously increases.

programme.title: The Legend Of Master Chai - EP 19
programme.desc: In Heaven, Chai (Leung Wing Chun) killed Huen (Ho Po Sang) over a pot of sweet lotus seed soup. He was expelled to earth to suffer, while at the same time, he had to help Huen and Nui, who were also sent down to earth, to regain their powers._x000D__x000D_Chai was punished to become the stupid and shabby son, of an earthly man. Huen, on the other hand, was his handsome and clever brother, who was loved by all. One day, Chai regained his magic power and started to challenge Huen.

programme.title: The Legend Of Master Chai - EP 20
programme.desc: In Heaven, Chai (Leung Wing Chun) killed Huen (Ho Po Sang) over a pot of sweet lotus seed soup. He was expelled to earth to suffer, while at the same time, he had to help Huen and Nui, who were also sent down to earth, to regain their powers._x000D__x000D_Chai was punished to become the stupid and shabby son, of an earthly man. Huen, on the other hand, was his handsome and clever brother, who was loved by all. One day, Chai regained his magic power and started to challenge Huen.

programme.title: The Silver Chamber Of Sorrows - EP 10
programme.desc: "Sheung’s Silver Chamber", the largest jewel company in Foshan, Guangdong Province China, is facing serious financial difficulties. In order to obtain a loan from SHUM’s family, SHEUNG HANG (Chun Pui), owner of the Chamber, together with his primary wife, CHOI SIU-DIP (Sit Ka Yin), plot to arrange marriage between SHEUNG WAN (Ng Wai Kwok), HANG’s younger brother, and SHUM WING-TUNG (Young Yuen Yee), daughter of SHUM’s family.

programme.title: Hong Kong Love Stories - EP 5
programme.desc: Nice guy designer Chan Tsz-long (Joey Law) and his idealist girlfriend Yau Hoi-kei (Katy Kung) are a typical Hong Kong couple reluctantly living an unsettled life due to land issues.
